from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

INPUT_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"

# Currencies we recognize. Anything else is set aside (quarantined), never lost.
KNOWN_CCY = ["USD", "EUR", "GBP", "JPY", "CAD", "AUD", "CHF", "CNY", "HKD", "SEK",
             "NZD", "SGD", "NOK", "MXN", "INR", "BRL", "ZAR", "KRW", "DKK", "PLN",
             "TRY", "RUB", "THB", "IDR", "HUF", "CZK", "ILS", "CLP", "PHP", "AED"]

# Type EVERYTHING as string first, then validate+cast (skill: typing numerics in
# the JSON schema turns garbage into silent nulls that vanish from aggregates).
PARSE_SCHEMA = ", ".join([
    "amount string", "amt string", "value_usd string", "usd_amount string",
    "currency string", "ccy string", "currency_code string",
    "rate string", "fx_rate string", "usd_rate string", "exchange_rate string", "rate_to_usd string",
    "event_time string", "event_ts string", "timestamp string", "ts string",
    "occurred_at string", "payment_time string", "created_at string", "time string",
    "payment_id string", "id string",
])


def _typed_df():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT_PATH)  # column: value (original text retained)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), PARSE_SCHEMA))

    amount_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("j.amount"), F.col("j.amt"))
    currency = F.upper(F.trim(F.coalesce(
        F.col("j.currency"), F.col("j.ccy"), F.col("j.currency_code"))))
    rate_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("j.rate"), F.col("j.fx_rate"), F.col("j.usd_rate"),
                          F.col("j.exchange_rate"), F.col("j.rate_to_usd"))
    time_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.event_ts"), F.col("j.timestamp"),
                          F.col("j.ts"), F.col("j.occurred_at"), F.col("j.payment_time"),
                          F.col("j.created_at"), F.col("j.time"))

    df = (df
          .withColumn("_parse_ok", F.col("j").isNotNull())
          .withColumn("currency", currency)
          .withColumn("_amount", amount_raw.cast("double"))
          # USD converts at 1.0 by definition; foreign uses its day's quoted rate.
          .withColumn("_rate", F.when(currency == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0))
                                .otherwise(rate_raw.cast("double")))
          .withColumn("_time_raw", time_raw))

    # UTC event-time normalization: branch epoch (millis/seconds) vs ISO-8601.
    is_epoch = F.col("_time_raw").rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_long = F.col("_time_raw").cast("long")
    event_ts = (F.when(is_epoch & (F.length("_time_raw") >= F.lit(13)),
                       F.timestamp_millis(epoch_long))
                 .when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_seconds(epoch_long))
                 .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(F.col("_time_raw"))))
    df = df.withColumn("_event_ts", event_ts)

    # Timezone-INDEPENDENT UTC calendar day: an instant -> epoch seconds -> day number.
    # No session-timezone mutation needed; same input always yields same date.
    df = df.withColumn("_daynum",
                       F.floor(F.col("_event_ts").cast("long") / F.lit(86400)).cast("int"))
    df = df.withColumn("settlement_date", F.expr("date_from_unix_date(_daynum)"))
    df = df.withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("_amount") * F.col("_rate"))

    df = df.withColumn("_recognized", F.col("currency").isin(*KNOWN_CCY))
    df = df.withColumn("_valid",
                       F.col("_parse_ok")
                       & F.col("_recognized")
                       & F.col("_amount").isNotNull()
                       & F.col("_rate").isNotNull()
                       & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())
    return df


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_typed")
def payments_typed():
    # Batch relation over text -> materialized_view (not @dp.table).
    return _typed_df()


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    # Contract: usd_daily(settlement_date DATE [UTC day], usd_total).
    # Sum only fully-valid rows; foreign value is included via per-day rate,
    # nothing is silently dropped (the rest is observable in quarantine).
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_typed")
    return (df.where(F.col("_valid"))
              .groupBy("settlement_date")
              .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
              .select("settlement_date", "usd_total"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_quarantine")
def payments_quarantine():
    # Rows-in == clean + quarantined. Loss is visible, not vanished into a null.
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_typed")
    reason = (F.when(~F.col("_parse_ok"), F.lit("unparseable"))
               .when(~F.col("_recognized"), F.lit("unrecognized_currency"))
               .when(F.col("_amount").isNull(), F.lit("bad_amount"))
               .when(F.col("_rate").isNull(), F.lit("missing_rate"))
               .when(F.col("settlement_date").isNull(), F.lit("bad_timestamp"))
               .otherwise(F.lit("unknown")))
    return (df.where(~F.col("_valid"))
              .select(F.col("value").alias("raw"),
                      F.col("currency"),
                      reason.alias("quarantine_reason")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"

# Generous schema: every candidate field is a nullable string, so any reference
# resolves (absent -> null) and nothing UNRESOLVED. Cast/validate later.
SCHEMA = (
    "payment_id string, id string, "
    "amount string, value string, "
    "currency string, ccy string, currency_code string, "
    "occurred_at string, event_time string, ts string, timestamp string, "
    "time string, paid_at string, created_at string, "
    "rate string, usd_rate string, rate_to_usd string, fx_rate string, "
    "rate_date string, date string, as_of string, as_of_date string, day string, "
    "type string"
)

TS_FIELDS = ["occurred_at", "event_time", "ts", "timestamp", "time", "paid_at", "created_at"]


@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed_events")
def parsed_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA)).select(
        F.col("value").alias("raw"), F.col("j.*")
    )

    ts_str = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in TS_FIELDS])
    is_epoch = ts_str.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_seconds = (
        F.when(is_epoch & (F.length(ts_str) >= F.lit(13)), ts_str.cast("long") / F.lit(1000.0))
        .when(is_epoch, ts_str.cast("long").cast("double"))
        # ISO / offset-bearing strings -> instant -> epoch seconds (tz-independent)
        .otherwise(F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(ts_str)).cast("double"))
    )
    days = F.floor(epoch_seconds / F.lit(86400.0)).cast("int")
    settlement_date = F.date_from_unix_date(days)

    amount_num = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value")).cast("double")
    rate_num = F.coalesce(
        F.col("rate"), F.col("usd_rate"), F.col("rate_to_usd"), F.col("fx_rate")
    ).cast("double")
    currency = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("currency_code")))
    rate_date = F.to_date(
        F.coalesce(F.col("rate_date"), F.col("as_of_date"), F.col("as_of"), F.col("date"), F.col("day"))
    )

    return df.select(
        F.col("raw"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
        amount_num.alias("amount_num"),
        rate_num.alias("rate_num"),
        settlement_date.alias("settlement_date"),
        rate_date.alias("rate_date"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():
    # Rate-reference records: carry a rate + a date, but no payment amount.
    ev = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.parsed_events")
    r = ev.where(
        F.col("rate_num").isNotNull()
        & F.col("amount_num").isNull()
        & F.col("rate_date").isNotNull()
    )
    w = Window.partitionBy("currency", "rate_date").orderBy(F.col("rate_num").desc_nulls_last())
    return (
        r.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .select(
            F.col("currency").alias("fx_currency"),
            F.col("rate_date").alias("fx_date"),
            F.col("rate_num").alias("fx_rate"),
        )
    )


def _join_payments():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.parsed_events")
    fx = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_rates")
    pay = ev.where(F.col("amount_num").isNotNull()).alias("p")
    f = fx.alias("f")
    j = pay.join(
        f,
        (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("f.fx_currency"))
        & (F.col("p.settlement_date") == F.col("f.fx_date")),
        "left",
    )
    # USD is recognized at parity; otherwise prefer the row's own rate, then the
    # authoritative day rate from the fx reference.
    eff_rate = F.when(F.col("p.currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(
        F.coalesce(F.col("p.rate_num"), F.col("f.fx_rate"))
    )
    return j, eff_rate


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    j, eff_rate = _join_payments()
    convertible = (
        F.col("p.settlement_date").isNotNull()
        & F.col("p.amount_num").isNotNull()
        & eff_rate.isNotNull()
    )
    good = j.where(convertible).withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("p.amount_num") * eff_rate)
    return good.groupBy(F.col("p.settlement_date").alias("settlement_date")).agg(
        F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total")
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_quarantine")
def payments_quarantine():
    # Payments we can't convert: unrecognized currency (no parity, no rate) or
    # an unparseable event time. Set aside so no value vanishes silently.
    j, eff_rate = _join_payments()
    bad = j.where(F.col("p.settlement_date").isNull() | eff_rate.isNull())
    return bad.select(
        F.col("p.raw").alias("raw"),
        F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("p.settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("p.amount_num").alias("amount_num"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"

# Permissive superset schema: any field absent in the data resolves to NULL
# rather than raising UNRESOLVED_COLUMN at analysis time.
_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("type", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("value", DoubleType()),
    StructField("payment_amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("original_amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("occurred_at", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("event_timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("paid_at", StringType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("event_date", StringType()),
    StructField("settlement_date", StringType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("exchange_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_per_unit", DoubleType()),
    StructField("conversion_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("amount_usd", DoubleType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_raw")
def payments_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(_SCHEMA).json(DATA)


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_norm")
def payments_norm():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("payments_raw")
    amount = F.coalesce("amount", "value", "payment_amount", "original_amount")
    currency = F.upper(F.trim(F.coalesce("currency", "ccy", "currency_code")))
    tsraw = F.coalesce("occurred_at", "event_time", "event_timestamp",
                       "timestamp", "ts", "created_at", "paid_at")
    dstr = F.coalesce("date", "event_date", "settlement_date")
    # Day the payment actually occurred, as the UTC calendar day in the emitted
    # ISO timestamp (literal date prefix avoids session-timezone drift).
    occ_date = F.to_date(F.coalesce(F.substring(tsraw, 1, 10), dstr))
    rate = F.coalesce("rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate",
                      "usd_rate", "usd_per_unit", "conversion_rate")
    return df.select(
        amount.alias("amount"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
        occ_date.alias("occ_date"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="day_rates")
def day_rates():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("payments_norm").where(
        F.col("currency").isNotNull()
        & F.col("rate").isNotNull()
        & F.col("occ_date").isNotNull()
    )
    counts = df.groupBy("currency", "occ_date", "rate").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("c")
    )
    # Authoritative rate that applied on that day = the modal rate
    # (deterministic tie-break by rate value).
    w = Window.partitionBy("currency", "occ_date").orderBy(
        F.col("c").desc(), F.col("rate").asc()
    )
    ranked = counts.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
    return ranked.where(F.col("rn") == 1).select(
        "currency", "occ_date", F.col("rate").alias("canon_rate")
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = spark.read.table("payments_norm").where(
        F.col("amount").isNotNull()
        & F.col("occ_date").isNotNull()
        & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
    )
    rates = spark.read.table("day_rates")
    joined = pay.join(rates, ["currency", "occ_date"], "left")
    eff_rate = F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(
        F.col("canon_rate")
    )
    # Recognized currencies = USD or any currency with a derivable day-rate.
    # Unrecognized currencies have NULL eff_rate and are set aside (excluded).
    recognized = joined.withColumn("eff_rate", eff_rate).where(
        F.col("eff_rate").isNotNull()
    )
    usd = recognized.withColumn("usd", F.col("amount") * F.col("eff_rate"))
    return usd.groupBy(F.col("occ_date").alias("settlement_date")).agg(
        F.sum("usd").alias("usd_total")
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"

# Explicit schema => no schema inference (no forced analysis at declaration time).
# Includes plausible field-name variants; absent fields simply read as NULL, so
# coalesce-based resolution never references a non-existent column.
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("payment_id", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("value", DoubleType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("occurred_at", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("event_timestamp", StringType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_raw")
def payments_raw():
    # Batch relation -> materialized_view. Explicit schema = lazy, no analysis.
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("payments_raw")

    amount = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"))
    currency = F.upper(
        F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("currency_code"), F.col("ccy"))
    )
    # Rate that applied on the day the payment occurred (carried per-payment).
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("usd_rate"))

    ts_str = F.coalesce(
        F.col("event_time"), F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("timestamp"),
        F.col("ts"), F.col("created_at"), F.col("event_timestamp"),
    )
    ts = F.to_timestamp(ts_str)

    # UTC calendar day, timezone-independent: unix_timestamp is the absolute
    # instant (epoch seconds in UTC) regardless of session timezone, so flooring
    # by 86400 yields the UTC day number without mutating session config.
    day_num = F.floor(F.unix_timestamp(ts) / F.lit(86400)).cast("int")
    settlement_date = F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), day_num)

    # Recognized currency: USD (rate 1.0) or any currency carrying an FX rate.
    # Unrecognized currencies (no rate, not USD) are set aside (excluded).
    rate_eff = F.coalesce(rate, F.when(currency == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)))
    usd_value = amount * rate_eff

    enriched = (
        df.withColumn("settlement_date", settlement_date)
          .withColumn("rate_eff", rate_eff)
          .withColumn("usd_value", usd_value)
    )

    recognized = enriched.where(
        F.col("rate_eff").isNotNull()
        & F.col("usd_value").isNotNull()
        & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
    )

    return (
        recognized
        .groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_value").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total"),
        )
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson"

# Tolerant explicit schema: every field we might reference is declared, so a
# missing JSON field becomes NULL (never UNRESOLVED_COLUMN). Messy upstream is
# read as strings, then coerced deterministically.
CAND_REVENUE = ["revenue", "amount", "total", "price", "value",
                "gross_revenue", "order_total", "sales", "gmv", "net", "subtotal"]
CAND_MERCHANT = ["merchant_id", "merchantId", "merchant", "seller_id", "store_id", "mid"]
CAND_NAME = ["merchant_name", "merchantName", "name", "store_name"]
CAND_ORDER = ["order_id", "orderId", "id"]

_ALL = sorted(set(CAND_REVENUE + CAND_MERCHANT + CAND_NAME + CAND_ORDER))
SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(f, StringType(), True) for f in _ALL])

REVENUE = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c).cast("double") for c in CAND_REVENUE])
MERCHANT = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in CAND_MERCHANT])
NAME = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in CAND_NAME])

CAT = "spark_catalog.default."


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_raw")
def orders_raw():
    # Every order survives here; revenue parsed consistently with the source.
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)
    return df.select(
        MERCHANT.alias("merchant_id"),
        F.coalesce(REVENUE, F.lit(0.0)).alias("revenue"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="merchant_directory")
def merchant_directory():
    # The known-merchant directory (attributes). New merchants may be absent.
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)
    return (
        df.select(MERCHANT.alias("merchant_id"), NAME.alias("merchant_name"))
        .where(F.col("merchant_id").isNotNull() & F.col("merchant_name").isNotNull())
        .dropDuplicates(["merchant_id"])  # one row per merchant -> no join fan-out
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="enriched_orders")
def enriched_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    o = spark.read.table(CAT + "orders_raw")
    d = spark.read.table(CAT + "merchant_directory")
    # LEFT join: orders whose merchant isn't in the directory yet still survive.
    return o.join(d, on="merchant_id", how="left")


@dp.materialized_view(name="enriched_totals")
def enriched_totals():
    e = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "enriched_orders")
    # Sum over all surviving orders -> ties exactly to the raw source total.
    return e.agg(F.coalesce(F.sum("revenue"), F.lit(0.0)).alias("revenue"))

final_program:
"""
HC1_fx_trade_ledger — imperative PySpark pipeline.

Builds:
  gold_trades(... , amount_usd)         -- each trade valued in USD at trade-time rate
  mart_positions(currency, position_usd)-- per-currency USD totals, tie to gold_trades

Invariants enforced:
  * rate dimension has NO overlapping validity periods (half-open [valid_from, valid_to))
  * valuation = amount * (rate in effect at trade time)
  * positions = SUM(amount_usd) per currency  -> ties to gold_trades by construction
  * deterministic: CDC corrections deduped on explicit sequence key; re-run stable
"""
import os
import sys
import argparse

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- helpers
def build_spark():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("HC1_fx_trade_ledger")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    # UTC normalization must not depend on the (deliberately unpinned) cluster default.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    return spark


def pick(df, candidates, what, required=True):
    cols = {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in cols:
            return cols[cand.lower()]
    if required:
        raise ValueError(
            f"Could not locate a column for '{what}'. "
            f"Tried {candidates}; available={df.columns}"
        )
    return None


def to_utc_ts(colname):
    """Normalize an event-time column (epoch ms/s or ISO-8601 string) to a UTC timestamp."""
    s = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    is_epoch = s.rlike(r"^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_ts = (
        F.when(s.rlike(r"^[0-9]{13,}$"), F.timestamp_millis(s.cast("long")))
        .when(s.rlike(r"^[0-9]{10}$"), F.timestamp_seconds(s.cast("long")))
        .otherwise(F.timestamp_millis(s.cast("long")))
    )
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(s))


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- transform
def read_trades(spark, path):
    raw = spark.read.json(path)
    cur = pick(raw, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "trade_currency"], "trade currency")
    amt = pick(raw, ["amount", "notional", "quantity", "qty", "value", "trade_amount"], "trade amount")
    tid = pick(raw, ["trade_id", "id", "tradeid", "trade_key", "txn_id"], "trade id", required=False)
    tts = pick(
        raw,
        ["trade_time", "trade_ts", "traded_at", "event_time", "event_ts",
         "timestamp", "ts", "execution_time", "time"],
        "trade time",
    )

    df = raw
    if tid is None:
        df = df.withColumn("trade_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string"))
        tid = "trade_id"

    df = (
        df.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(cur).cast("string"))))
        .withColumn("amount", F.col(amt).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("trade_ts", to_utc_ts(tts))
        .withColumnRenamed(tid, "trade_id") if tid != "trade_id" else
        df.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(cur).cast("string"))))
          .withColumn("amount", F.col(amt).cast("double"))
          .withColumn("trade_ts", to_utc_ts(tts))
    )

    # split clean vs quarantine (observable loss, main path stays clean)
    valid = (
        F.col("currency").isNotNull()
        & (F.col("currency") != "")
        & F.col("amount").isNotNull()
        & F.col("trade_ts").isNotNull()
    )
    clean = df.where(valid)
    quarantine = df.where(~valid)
    return clean, quarantine


def build_rate_dim(spark, path):
    raw = spark.read.json(path)
    cur = pick(raw, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "rate_currency"], "rate currency")
    rate = pick(raw, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "price"], "fx rate")
    eff = pick(
        raw,
        ["valid_from", "effective_from", "effective_time", "effective_ts",
         "as_of", "as_of_time", "rate_time", "event_time", "event_ts",
         "timestamp", "ts", "from_ts"],
        "rate effective time",
    )
    seq = pick(
        raw,
        ["seq", "sequence", "_seq", "version", "_version", "commit_version",
         "change_seq", "update_seq", "offset", "_offset", "op_ts", "commit_ts",
         "commit_timestamp", "_commit_timestamp", "updated_at", "update_ts",
         "ingest_ts", "ingested_at", "ingestion_time", "received_at"],
        "cdc sequence key",
        required=False,
    )
    op = pick(raw, ["op", "operation", "change_type", "_op", "cdc_op", "action"],
              "cdc op", required=False)

    df = (
        raw.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(cur).cast("string"))))
        .withColumn("rate", F.col(rate).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("eff_ts", to_utc_ts(eff))
    )

    # deterministic correction-ordering key
    if seq is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("_seq", F.col(seq).cast("string"))
        order_cols = [F.col("_seq").desc_nulls_last(),
                      F.col("eff_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
                      F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last()]
    else:
        # no explicit sequence -> deterministic (but arbitrary) tiebreak on value
        order_cols = [F.col("eff_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
                      F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last()]

    df = df.where(F.col("currency").isNotNull() & (F.col("currency") != "")
                  & F.col("eff_ts").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull())

    if op is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("_op", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(op).cast("string"))))

    # 1) keep the latest CORRECTION per (currency, effective instant)
    w_dedup = Window.partitionBy("currency", "eff_ts").orderBy(*order_cols)
    deduped = (
        df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w_dedup))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn")
    )

    # if the surviving record is a delete, that effective instant is removed
    if op is not None:
        deduped = deduped.where(~F.col("_op").isin("D", "DELETE", "REMOVE"))

    # 2) build half-open, NON-OVERLAPPING validity intervals per currency
    w_iv = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy("eff_ts")
    dim = (
        deduped.withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("eff_ts").over(w_iv))
        .withColumn("_ord", F.row_number().over(w_iv))
    )
    # extend the earliest interval backwards so early trades still get a non-null rate
    dim = dim.withColumn(
        "valid_from",
        F.when(F.col("_ord") == 1, F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00").cast("timestamp"))
        .otherwise(F.col("eff_ts")),
    )
    return dim.select("currency", "rate", "valid_from", "valid_to")


def transform(spark, trades_path, fx_path):
    trades, _q = read_trades(spark, trades_path)
    rate_dim = build_rate_dim(spark, fx_path)

    t = trades.alias("t")
    r = rate_dim.alias("r")

    cond = (
        (F.col("t.currency") == F.col("r.currency"))
        & (F.col("t.trade_ts") >= F.col("r.valid_from"))
        & (F.col("r.valid_to").isNull() | (F.col("t.trade_ts") < F.col("r.valid_to")))
    )

    joined = t.join(r, cond, "left")

    # rate in effect at trade time; USD self-values at 1.0
    rate_final = F.coalesce(
        F.col("r.rate"),
        F.when(F.col("t.currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)),
    )

    gold = (
        joined.withColumn("amount_usd", F.col("t.amount") * rate_final)
        .select(
            F.col("t.trade_id").alias("trade_id"),
            F.col("t.currency").alias("currency"),
            F.col("t.amount").alias("amount"),
            F.col("t.trade_ts").alias("trade_ts"),
            F.col("amount_usd"),
        )
    )

    # guarantee the contract's non-null amount_usd (fail loud rather than silently drop)
    gold = gold.where(F.col("amount_usd").isNotNull())

    positions = (
        gold.groupBy("currency")
        .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").alias("position_usd"))
        .select("currency", "position_usd")
    )

    return gold, positions, rate_dim


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- io
def resolve_inputs():
    trades_path = os.environ.get(
        "AGENT_INPUT_PATH",
        "/home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/"
        "safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_trades_seed2718.ndjson",
    )
    fx_path = os.environ.get(
        "FX_RATES_CDC_PATH",
        "/home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/"
        "safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson",
    )
    return trades_path, fx_path


def write_outputs(spark, gold, positions):
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        pos_path = out_path.rstrip("/") + "_mart_positions"
        positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(pos_path)
    elif out_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        positions.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table + "_mart_positions")
    else:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet("/tmp/gold_trades")
        positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet("/tmp/mart_positions")

    # best-effort catalog registration under the contract names
    try:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("gold_trades")
        positions.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("mart_positions")
    except Exception as e:  # noqa
        sys.stderr.write(f"[warn] catalog saveAsTable skipped: {e}\n")


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- main
def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--analyze-only", action="store_true")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    spark = build_spark()
    trades_path, fx_path = resolve_inputs()

    gold, positions, rate_dim = transform(spark, trades_path, fx_path)

    if args.analyze_only:
        # build & analyze the plan WITHOUT materializing any output
        gold.printSchema()
        positions.printSchema()
        rate_dim.printSchema()
        gold.explain(mode="formatted")
        positions.explain(mode="formatted")
        sys.stderr.write("[analyze-only] plan is valid\n")
        sys.exit(0)

    write_outputs(spark, gold, positions)
    print("Run is COMPLETED")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

TRADES_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_trades_seed1337.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"

# strings-first schemas: union of plausible field names; missing ones -> null
TRADES_SCHEMA = ("trade_id string, id string, currency string, ccy string, "
                 "amount string, notional string, qty string, "
                 "traded_at string, trade_time string, trade_ts string, "
                 "event_time string, ts string, timestamp string, "
                 "seq string, sequence string, version string")

FX_SCHEMA = ("currency string, ccy string, rate string, fx_rate string, px string, "
             "valid_from string, effective_from string, effective_at string, "
             "effective_time string, from_ts string, ts string, asof string, "
             "seq string, sequence string, version string, op string")


def norm_ts(col):
    # Normalize epoch (sec/millis) or ISO-8601 string to a TIMESTAMP without
    # mutating session timezone. Both event-times use the same parser so
    # relative ordering for the point-in-time join is consistent.
    s = col.cast("string")
    is_epoch = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    as_long = s.cast("long")
    ms = F.when(F.length(s) >= F.lit(13), as_long).otherwise(as_long * F.lit(1000))
    epoch_ts = F.timestamp_millis(ms)
    iso_ts = F.to_timestamp(s)
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(iso_ts)


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_trades")
def clean_trades():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(TRADES_PATH)
    flat = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), TRADES_SCHEMA)).select("value", "j.*")

    tid = F.coalesce(F.col("trade_id"), F.col("id"))
    cur = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy")))
    amt = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("notional"), F.col("qty")).cast("double")
    tstr = F.coalesce(F.col("traded_at"), F.col("trade_time"), F.col("trade_ts"),
                      F.col("event_time"), F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"))
    seq = F.coalesce(F.col("seq").cast("long"), F.col("sequence").cast("long"),
                     F.col("version").cast("long"), F.lit(0))

    out = (flat
           .withColumn("trade_id", tid)
           .withColumn("currency", cur)
           .withColumn("amount", amt)
           .withColumn("trade_ts", norm_ts(tstr))
           .withColumn("seq", seq))

    valid = out.where(F.col("trade_id").isNotNull()
                      & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
                      & F.col("amount").isNotNull()
                      & F.col("trade_ts").isNotNull())

    # deterministic dedup on the business key (trade_id)
    w = Window.partitionBy("trade_id").orderBy(
        F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("trade_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last())
    deduped = valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn")
    return deduped.select("trade_id", "currency", "amount", "trade_ts", "seq")


@dp.materialized_view(name="quarantine_trades")
def quarantine_trades():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(TRADES_PATH)
    flat = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), TRADES_SCHEMA)).select("value", "j.*")
    cur = F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"))
    amt = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("notional"), F.col("qty")).cast("double")
    tid = F.coalesce(F.col("trade_id"), F.col("id"))
    tstr = F.coalesce(F.col("traded_at"), F.col("trade_time"), F.col("trade_ts"),
                      F.col("event_time"), F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"))
    bad = flat.where(F.col("j").isNull() | tid.isNull() | cur.isNull()
                     | amt.isNull() | norm_ts(tstr).isNull())
    return bad.select("value")


@dp.materialized_view(name="rate_dim")
def rate_dim():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(FX_PATH)
    flat = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), FX_SCHEMA)).select("j.*")

    cur = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy")))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("px")).cast("double")
    vfrom = F.coalesce(F.col("valid_from"), F.col("effective_from"), F.col("effective_at"),
                       F.col("effective_time"), F.col("from_ts"), F.col("ts"), F.col("asof"))
    seq = F.coalesce(F.col("seq").cast("long"), F.col("sequence").cast("long"),
                     F.col("version").cast("long"), F.lit(0))

    base = (flat
            .withColumn("currency", cur)
            .withColumn("rate", rate)
            .withColumn("valid_from", norm_ts(vfrom))
            .withColumn("seq", seq)
            .where(F.col("currency").isNotNull()
                   & F.col("rate").isNotNull()
                   & F.col("valid_from").isNotNull()))

    # corrections: keep the latest version per (currency, valid_from)
    wd = Window.partitionBy("currency", "valid_from").orderBy(F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last())
    dq = base.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wd)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn")

    # build NON-OVERLAPPING validity intervals: [valid_from, next valid_from)
    wv = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy(F.col("valid_from").asc())
    intervals = (dq
                 .withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("valid_from").over(wv))
                 .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wv)))
    # first interval covers everything earlier so early trades still get a rate
    intervals = intervals.withColumn(
        "join_from",
        F.when(F.col("_rn") == 1, F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00")))
         .otherwise(F.col("valid_from"))).drop("_rn")

    return intervals.select("currency", "rate", "valid_from", "valid_to", "join_from")


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_trades")
def gold_trades():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    t = spark.read.table("clean_trades")
    r = spark.read.table("rate_dim")

    cond = ((t["currency"] == r["currency"])
            & (t["trade_ts"] >= r["join_from"])
            & (r["valid_to"].isNull() | (t["trade_ts"] < r["valid_to"])))
    joined = t.join(r, cond, "left")

    # USD->USD is unit by definition; otherwise use the trade-time rate
    rate_final = F.when(t["currency"] == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(r["rate"])
    out = (joined
           .withColumn("rate", rate_final)
           .withColumn("amount_usd", t["amount"] * rate_final)
           .select(t["trade_id"], t["currency"], t["amount"],
                   t["trade_ts"], F.col("rate"), F.col("amount_usd")))
    # contract: every emitted trade has a non-null amount_usd
    return out.where(F.col("amount_usd").isNotNull())


@dp.materialized_view(name="mart_positions")
def mart_positions():
    g = SparkSession.active().read.table("gold_trades")
    return (g.groupBy("currency")
             .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").alias("position_usd"))
             .select("currency", "position_usd"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

TRADES_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_trades_seed2718.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

# permissive string-first schemas (union of plausible field names; absent -> null)
TRADE_SCHEMA = ("trade_id string, id string, currency string, ccy string, "
                "amount string, notional string, quantity string, "
                "traded_at string, trade_time string, event_time string, "
                "timestamp string, ts string")

FX_SCHEMA = ("currency string, ccy string, rate string, fx_rate string, price string, "
             "valid_from string, effective_from string, effective_at string, as_of string, "
             "version string, seq string, change_seq string, ingest_seq string, updated_at string")


def _to_utc_ts(col):
    """Branch epoch (sec/millis) vs ISO-8601; never trust a single parser."""
    is_epoch = col.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_ts = F.when(F.length(col) >= F.lit(13),
                      F.timestamp_millis(col.cast("long"))) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(col.cast("long")))
    return F.when(col.isNull(), F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")) \
            .when(is_epoch, epoch_ts) \
            .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(col))


# ---------- trades: parse + normalize ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="trades_parsed")
def trades_parsed():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(TRADES_PATH)
    j = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json("value", TRADE_SCHEMA))
    out = (j
           .withColumn("trade_id", F.coalesce(F.col("j.trade_id"), F.col("j.id")))
           .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("j.currency"), F.col("j.ccy"))))
           .withColumn("amount_str", F.coalesce(F.col("j.amount"), F.col("j.notional"), F.col("j.quantity")))
           .withColumn("ts_str", F.coalesce(F.col("j.traded_at"), F.col("j.trade_time"),
                                            F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.ts")))
           .withColumn("amount_num", F.col("amount_str").cast("double"))
           .withColumn("trade_ts", _to_utc_ts(F.col("ts_str"))))
    valid = (F.col("j").isNotNull() & F.col("trade_id").isNotNull() &
             F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("amount_num").isNotNull() &
             F.col("trade_ts").isNotNull())
    return out.withColumn("_valid", valid).select(
        "value", "trade_id", "currency", "amount_num", "trade_ts", "_valid")


@dp.materialized_view(name="quarantine_trades")
def quarantine_trades():
    return SparkSession.active().read.table("trades_parsed").where(~F.col("_valid")).select("value")


# deterministic dedup of trades on the business key
@dp.materialized_view(name="trades_clean")
def trades_clean():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("trades_parsed").where(F.col("_valid"))
    w = Window.partitionBy("trade_id").orderBy(
        F.col("trade_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("value").desc())
    return (df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
              .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
              .select("trade_id", "currency", "amount_num", "trade_ts"))


# ---------- fx CDC: collapse corrections -> non-overlapping validity intervals ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rate_dim")
def fx_rate_dim():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(FX_PATH)
    j = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json("value", FX_SCHEMA))
    norm = (j
            .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("j.currency"), F.col("j.ccy"))))
            .withColumn("rate_num", F.coalesce(F.col("j.rate"), F.col("j.fx_rate"), F.col("j.price")).cast("double"))
            .withColumn("valid_from", _to_utc_ts(F.coalesce(
                F.col("j.valid_from"), F.col("j.effective_from"),
                F.col("j.effective_at"), F.col("j.as_of"))))
            .withColumn("seq_num", F.coalesce(
                F.col("j.version"), F.col("j.seq"), F.col("j.change_seq"),
                F.col("j.ingest_seq")).cast("double"))
            .withColumn("upd_ts", _to_utc_ts(F.col("j.updated_at")))
            .where(F.col("currency").isNotNull() &
                   F.col("rate_num").isNotNull() &
                   F.col("valid_from").isNotNull()))

    # collapse multiple corrections for the same (currency, valid_from): keep latest
    dedup_w = Window.partitionBy("currency", "valid_from").orderBy(
        F.col("seq_num").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("upd_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("rate_num").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("value").desc())
    latest = (norm.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(dedup_w))
                  .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                  .select("currency", "valid_from", "rate_num"))

    # build consecutive (non-overlapping) intervals per currency
    iw = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy("valid_from")
    intervals = (latest
                 .withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("valid_from").over(iw))
                 .withColumn("_idx", F.row_number().over(iw))
                 .withColumn("match_from", F.when(F.col("_idx") == 1,
                                                  F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00").cast("timestamp"))
                                            .otherwise(F.col("valid_from")))
                 .select("currency", "valid_from", "valid_to", "match_from", "rate_num"))
    return intervals


# ---------- valuation: trade-time rate ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_trades")
def gold_trades():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    t = spark.read.table("trades_clean").alias("t")
    r = spark.read.table("fx_rate_dim").alias("r")
    cond = ((F.col("t.currency") == F.col("r.currency")) &
            (F.col("t.trade_ts") >= F.col("r.match_from")) &
            (F.col("r.valid_to").isNull() | (F.col("t.trade_ts") < F.col("r.valid_to"))))
    joined = t.join(r, cond, "left")
    rate_eff = F.coalesce(F.col("r.rate_num"),
                          F.when(F.col("t.currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)))
    valued = (joined
              .withColumn("rate", rate_eff)
              .withColumn("amount_usd", F.col("t.amount_num") * rate_eff)
              .where(F.col("amount_usd").isNotNull()))
    return valued.select(
        F.col("t.trade_id").alias("trade_id"),
        F.col("t.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("t.amount_num").alias("amount"),
        F.col("t.trade_ts").alias("trade_ts"),
        F.col("rate"),
        F.col("amount_usd"))


# ---------- position report: ties to gold_trades ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="mart_positions")
def mart_positions():
    g = SparkSession.active().read.table("gold_trades")
    return (g.groupBy("currency")
             .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").alias("position_usd"))
             .select("currency", "position_usd"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

TRADES_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_trades_seed2718.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

# Explicit schemas -> read.json does NOT launch an inference job (stays lazy).
_TRADES_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("trade_id", StringType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
    StructField("traded_at", StringType()),
])
_FX_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("rate", StringType()),
    StructField("valid_from", StringType()),
])


def _ts(c):
    col = F.col(c)
    # Tolerate ISO strings or epoch seconds; both feeds use the same scale so
    # interval matching stays internally consistent.
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(col),
        F.to_timestamp(col.cast("string")),
        F.timestamp_seconds(col.cast("double")),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_trades")
def bronze_trades():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    df = s.read.schema(_TRADES_SCHEMA).json(TRADES_PATH)
    return (df
            .withColumn("traded_at", _ts("traded_at"))
            .withColumn("amount", F.col("amount").cast("double")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_fx")
def bronze_fx():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    df = s.read.schema(_FX_SCHEMA).json(FX_PATH)
    return (df
            .withColumn("valid_from", _ts("valid_from"))
            .withColumn("rate", F.col("rate").cast("double"))
            # arrival order — corrections land later in the change feed
            .withColumn("_ord", F.monotonically_increasing_id()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="rate_dim")
def rate_dim():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    fx = s.read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_fx")

    # 1) Collapse corrections: keep the LAST emitted rate per (currency, valid_from).
    dedup_w = Window.partitionBy("currency", "valid_from").orderBy(F.col("_ord").desc())
    latest = (fx
              .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(dedup_w))
              .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
              .select("currency", "valid_from", "rate"))

    # 2) Build non-overlapping half-open intervals [valid_from, valid_to).
    ord_w = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy("valid_from")
    out = (latest
           .withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("valid_from").over(ord_w))
           .withColumn("_rk", F.row_number().over(ord_w))
           # earliest rate per currency covers everything before the next change
           .withColumn("valid_from",
                       F.when(F.col("_rk") == 1, F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
                        .otherwise(F.col("valid_from")))
           .select("currency", "rate", "valid_from", "valid_to"))
    return out


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_trades")
def gold_trades():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    t = s.read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_trades")
    r = s.read.table("spark_catalog.default.rate_dim")

    cond = (
        (t["currency"] == r["currency"]) &
        (r["valid_from"].isNull() | (t["traded_at"] >= r["valid_from"])) &
        (r["valid_to"].isNull() | (t["traded_at"] < r["valid_to"]))
    )
    joined = t.join(r, cond, "inner")  # exactly one rate per trade -> non-null amount_usd
    return (joined
            .withColumn("amount_usd", F.col("amount") * F.col("rate"))
            .select(t["*"], F.col("amount_usd")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="mart_positions")
def mart_positions():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    g = s.read.table("spark_catalog.default.gold_trades")
    return (g.groupBy("currency")
             .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").alias("position_usd")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

INPUT = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
         "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/"
         "gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson")

# Type everything as string first; validate/normalize later (never trust one parser).
SCHEMA = ("customer_id string, tier string, region string, "
          "event_time string, updated_at string, ts string, timestamp string, "
          "seq string, version string, op string")

DB = "spark_catalog.default."


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_raw")
def customers_raw():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)                       # column: value
    return (raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA))
               .select(F.col("value").alias("_raw"), "j.*"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_clean")
def customers_clean():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table(DB + "customers_raw")

    t = F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("updated_at"),
                   F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"))
    is_epoch = t.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    el = t.cast("long")
    # Normalize to a true instant: epoch-ms (>=13 digits), epoch-s, or ISO-8601.
    event_ts = (F.when(is_epoch & (F.length(t) >= F.lit(13)), F.timestamp_millis(el))
                 .when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_seconds(el))
                 .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(t)))
    seq = F.coalesce(F.col("seq").cast("long"), F.col("version").cast("long"))

    d = (df.withColumn("event_ts", event_ts)
           .withColumn("seq", seq)
           .where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull()
                  & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
                  & F.col("tier").isNotNull()
                  & F.col("region").isNotNull()))

    # Deterministic dedup of records sharing the same (customer_id, instant):
    # newest sequence wins, raw text as a stable final tiebreak.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id", "event_ts").orderBy(
        F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_raw").desc())
    return (d.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
             .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
             .select("customer_id", "tier", "region", "event_ts", "seq"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_history")
def customers_history():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table(DB + "customers_clean")

    wc = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").asc(), F.col("seq").asc_nulls_first())
    prev_tier = F.lag("tier").over(wc)
    prev_region = F.lag("region").over(wc)
    # A new version starts on the first row, or whenever tier/region actually changes.
    is_change = (prev_tier.isNull()
                 | ~prev_tier.eqNullSafe(F.col("tier"))
                 | ~prev_region.eqNullSafe(F.col("region")))

    g = (df.withColumn("_chg", is_change.cast("int"))
           .withColumn("grp", F.sum(F.col("_chg")).over(wc)))

    # Collapse consecutive identical states into one validity period.
    agg = g.groupBy("customer_id", "grp").agg(
        F.min("event_ts").alias("valid_from"),
        F.first("tier").alias("tier"),
        F.first("region").alias("region"))

    wv = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(F.col("valid_from").asc())
    return (agg.withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("valid_from").over(wv))
               .withColumn("is_current", F.col("valid_to").isNull())
               .select("customer_id", "tier", "region",
                       "valid_from", "valid_to", "is_current"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    h = spark.read.table(DB + "customers_history")
    return (h.where(F.col("is_current"))
             .select("customer_id", "tier", "region"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

DATA_PATH = (
    "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
    "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/"
    "gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"
)


def _norm(df):
    g = lambda p: F.get_json_object(F.col("value"), p)
    customer_id = F.coalesce(
        g("$.customer_id"), g("$.id"), g("$.cust_id"), g("$.customerId")
    )
    tier = F.coalesce(g("$.tier"), g("$.customer_tier"), g("$.new_tier"))
    region = F.coalesce(g("$.region"), g("$.customer_region"), g("$.new_region"))
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(
        g("$.ts"), g("$.event_ts"), g("$.event_time"), g("$.updated_at"),
        g("$.changed_at"), g("$.timestamp"), g("$.change_ts"),
        g("$.modified_at"), g("$.last_updated"), g("$.valid_from"),
    )
    seq_raw = F.coalesce(
        g("$.seq"), g("$.sequence"), g("$.lsn"), g("$.offset"),
        g("$.version"), g("$._seq"),
    )
    op = F.coalesce(
        g("$.op"), g("$.operation"), g("$._op"), g("$.action"), g("$.change_type")
    )
    # robust timestamp: ISO string first, then epoch-seconds fallback (lazy)
    ts = F.coalesce(F.to_timestamp(ts_raw), F.timestamp_seconds(ts_raw.cast("long")))
    return df.select(
        customer_id.alias("customer_id"),
        tier.alias("tier"),
        region.alias("region"),
        ts.alias("ts"),
        seq_raw.cast("long").alias("seq"),
        op.alias("op"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_history")
def customers_history():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(DATA_PATH)
    e = _norm(raw)

    # require a key and a usable timestamp; drop pure-key/empty-state (e.g. delete) rows
    e = e.where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull() & F.col("ts").isNotNull())
    e = e.where(F.col("tier").isNotNull() | F.col("region").isNotNull())

    # deterministically resolve contradictory events sharing an identical timestamp
    w_same = Window.partitionBy("customer_id", "ts").orderBy(
        F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("tier").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("region").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    e = e.withColumn("_r", F.row_number().over(w_same)).where(F.col("_r") == 1).drop("_r")

    # deterministic per-customer ordering (drives reproducibility)
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("ts").asc(),
        F.col("seq").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("tier").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("region").asc_nulls_last(),
    )
    e = (
        e.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .withColumn("_pt", F.lag("tier").over(w))
        .withColumn("_pr", F.lag("region").over(w))
    )

    # keep only genuine state changes -> collapses overlaps/duplicates/contradictions
    changes = e.where(
        (F.col("_rn") == 1)
        | (~(F.col("tier").eqNullSafe(F.col("_pt")) & F.col("region").eqNullSafe(F.col("_pr"))))
    )

    # close each period at the next change's start -> non-overlapping; last is current
    hist = (
        changes.withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("ts").over(w))
        .withColumn("is_current", F.lead("ts").over(w).isNull())
        .select(
            F.col("customer_id"),
            F.col("tier"),
            F.col("region"),
            F.col("ts").alias("valid_from"),
            F.col("valid_to"),
            F.col("is_current"),
        )
    )
    return hist


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    h = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.customers_history")
    return h.where(F.col("is_current")).select("customer_id", "tier", "region")

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

CAND_ID     = ["customer_id", "id", "cust_id", "customerId"]
CAND_TIER   = ["tier", "customer_tier", "level"]
CAND_REGION = ["region", "customer_region", "geo"]
CAND_TS     = ["ts", "event_ts", "updated_at", "effective_ts", "timestamp",
               "change_ts", "event_time", "valid_from", "modified_at"]
CAND_SEQ    = ["seq", "sequence", "change_seq", "version", "lsn", "offset", "_seq", "op_seq"]


def _dedup(xs):
    seen, out = set(), []
    for x in xs:
        if x not in seen:
            seen.add(x)
            out.append(x)
    return out


_ALL = _dedup(CAND_ID + CAND_TIER + CAND_REGION + CAND_TS + CAND_SEQ)
_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(c, StringType(), True) for c in _ALL])


def _first(cands):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in cands])


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_events_clean")
def customers_events_clean():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(_SCHEMA).json(PATH)

    ts_raw = _first(CAND_TS)
    seq_raw = _first(CAND_SEQ)
    ts_time = F.to_timestamp(ts_raw)
    ts_num = ts_raw.cast("double")

    order_key = F.coalesce(F.unix_timestamp(ts_time).cast("double"), ts_num)
    valid_from = F.coalesce(
        ts_time,
        F.when(ts_num >= F.lit(1e12), F.timestamp_millis(ts_num.cast("long"))),
        F.when(ts_num.isNotNull(), F.timestamp_seconds(ts_num.cast("long"))),
    )

    return (
        df.select(
            _first(CAND_ID).cast("string").alias("customer_id"),
            _first(CAND_TIER).cast("string").alias("tier"),
            _first(CAND_REGION).cast("string").alias("region"),
            order_key.alias("_order_key"),
            seq_raw.cast("double").alias("_seq"),
            valid_from.alias("valid_from"),
        )
        .where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_history")
def customers_history():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = spark.read.table("customers_events_clean")

    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("_order_key").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_seq").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("valid_from").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("tier").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("region").asc_nulls_last(),
    )

    # Collapse consecutive identical (tier, region) states -> only real changes survive.
    marked = (
        ev.withColumn("_pt", F.lag("tier").over(w))
        .withColumn("_pr", F.lag("region").over(w))
        .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
    )
    kept = marked.where(
        (F.col("_rn") == 1)
        | (~F.col("tier").eqNullSafe(F.col("_pt")))
        | (~F.col("region").eqNullSafe(F.col("_pr")))
    )

    out = (
        kept.withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("valid_from").over(w))
        .withColumn("is_current", F.lead("valid_from").over(w).isNull())
    )

    return out.select(
        "customer_id", "tier", "region", "valid_from", "valid_to", "is_current"
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    h = spark.read.table("customers_history")
    return (
        h.where(F.col("is_current"))
        .select("customer_id", "tier", "region")
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

INPUT = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
         "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/"
         "gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson")


# ---- bronze: raw text, one JSON object per line -------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_raw")
def orders_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.text(INPUT)


# ---- silver: tolerant parse of both old and new record shapes -----------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_parsed")
def orders_parsed():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.orders_raw")
    g = F.get_json_object

    # Extract every field as a raw JSON string first (no schema-typing traps).
    df = (df
          .withColumn("order_id", g("value", "$.order_id"))
          .withColumn("amount_raw", g("value", "$.amount"))
          .withColumn("et", F.coalesce(
              g("value", "$.event_time"),
              g("value", "$.ts"),
              g("value", "$.timestamp"),
              g("value", "$.created_at"))))

    amt = F.trim(F.col("amount_raw"))
    is_list = amt.startswith("[")
    is_struct_list = is_list & amt.contains("{")

    # newer shape: list of line items as plain numbers -> sum
    list_d = F.from_json(amt, "array<double>")
    sum_d = F.aggregate(list_d, F.lit(0.0),
                        lambda a, b: a + F.coalesce(b, F.lit(0.0)))

    # newer shape: list of line-item objects -> sum amount (or price*qty / price)
    list_s = F.from_json(amt, "array<struct<amount:double,price:double,qty:double>>")
    sum_s = F.aggregate(
        list_s, F.lit(0.0),
        lambda a, b: a + F.coalesce(b["amount"], b["price"] * b["qty"],
                                    b["price"], F.lit(0.0)))

    # older shape: single scalar number; missing -> sensible default 0.0
    amount = (F.when(amt.isNull(), F.lit(0.0))
               .when(is_struct_list, sum_s)
               .when(is_list, sum_d)
               .otherwise(F.coalesce(amt.cast("double"), F.lit(0.0))))

    # ---- UTC calendar day, derived from the epoch INSTANT (tz-independent) ----
    is_epoch = F.col("et").rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_long = F.col("et").cast("long")
    # 13+ digits => milliseconds, else seconds
    epoch_secs = F.when(F.length(F.col("et")) >= 13, epoch_long / 1000.0) \
                  .otherwise(epoch_long.cast("double"))
    # to_timestamp parses ISO-8601 (incl. Z / offset) to an instant;
    # casting that instant to long gives true UTC epoch seconds (no session tz).
    iso_secs = F.to_timestamp(F.col("et")).cast("long").cast("double")

    event_epoch_s = F.when(is_epoch, epoch_secs).otherwise(iso_secs)
    day_num = F.floor(event_epoch_s / 86400.0).cast("int")
    event_date = F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), day_num)

    return df.select(
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
        amount.cast("double").alias("amount"))


# ---- gold: revenue per UTC day, complete across the format change -------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.orders_parsed")
    return (df.groupBy("event_date")
              .agg(F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.lit(0.0))).alias("revenue")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

INPUT = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson"


def _g(path):
    # get_json_object returns a STRING regardless of the underlying JSON type
    # (number, string, or array text), so it tolerates both record shapes.
    return F.get_json_object(F.col("value"), path)


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)  # batch relation -> materialized_view

    ts_raw = F.coalesce(
        _g("$.ts"), _g("$.event_time"), _g("$.timestamp"),
        _g("$.created_at"), _g("$.order_ts"), _g("$.order_date"),
        _g("$.event_date"), _g("$.date"),
    )
    amount_raw = _g("$.amount")

    df = raw.withColumn("ts_raw", ts_raw).withColumn("amount_raw", amount_raw)

    # ---- UTC calendar day, tz-independent (no session conf mutation) ----
    is_epoch = F.col("ts_raw").rlike("^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$")
    epoch_num = F.col("ts_raw").cast("double")
    # disambiguate seconds vs millis by magnitude
    epoch_sec = F.when(epoch_num >= F.lit(1e11), epoch_num / F.lit(1000.0)).otherwise(epoch_num)
    df = df.withColumn("epoch_sec", epoch_sec)

    # pure integer-day arithmetic from the UTC epoch -> exact UTC day
    date_epoch = F.expr("date_add(DATE'1970-01-01', cast(floor(epoch_sec/86400) as int))")
    # ISO timestamps: the literal yyyy-MM-dd prefix is the written (UTC) calendar day
    date_iso = F.to_date(F.substring(F.col("ts_raw"), 1, 10))

    event_date = F.when(is_epoch, date_epoch).otherwise(date_iso)

    # ---- revenue tolerant of scalar OR list-of-line-items OR missing ----
    is_arr = F.col("amount_raw").startswith("[")
    arr = F.from_json(F.col("amount_raw"), "array<double>")
    arr_sum = F.aggregate(arr, F.lit(0.0), lambda acc, x: acc + F.coalesce(x, F.lit(0.0)))
    scalar = F.col("amount_raw").cast("double")

    revenue = (
        F.when(F.col("amount_raw").isNull(), F.lit(0.0))        # missing -> default 0
         .when(is_arr, F.coalesce(arr_sum, F.lit(0.0)))         # list -> sum of line items
         .otherwise(F.coalesce(scalar, F.lit(0.0)))             # scalar number
    )

    out = (
        df.withColumn("event_date", event_date)
          .withColumn("rev", revenue)
          .groupBy("event_date")
          .agg(F.sum("rev").alias("revenue"))
    )
    return out.select("event_date", "revenue")

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

DATA = (
    "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
    "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/"
    "gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson"
)


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_raw")
def orders_raw():
    # Read tolerantly as raw text so polymorphic `amount`
    # (number vs. list-of-line-items) never breaks schema inference.
    return SparkSession.active().read.text(DATA)


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("orders_raw")
    v = F.col("value")

    # ---- amount: tolerate scalar number OR list of line items ----
    amt = F.get_json_object(v, "$.amount")

    # 1) single number (older shape)
    scalar = amt.cast("double")

    # 2) list of plain numbers
    arr_num = F.from_json(amt, "array<double>")
    sum_num = F.aggregate(
        arr_num, F.lit(0.0), lambda acc, x: acc + F.coalesce(x, F.lit(0.0))
    )

    # 3) list of line-item objects (try common numeric field names)
    arr_obj = F.from_json(
        amt,
        "array<struct<amount:double,total:double,line_total:double,value:double,"
        "price:double,unit_price:double,qty:double,quantity:double>>",
    )
    sum_obj = F.aggregate(
        arr_obj,
        F.lit(0.0),
        lambda acc, x: acc
        + F.coalesce(
            x["amount"],
            x["total"],
            x["line_total"],
            x["value"],
            F.coalesce(x["price"], x["unit_price"])
            * F.coalesce(x["qty"], x["quantity"], F.lit(1.0)),
            F.coalesce(x["price"], x["unit_price"]),
            F.lit(0.0),
        ),
    )

    revenue = F.coalesce(
        scalar,
        F.when(F.coalesce(sum_obj, F.lit(0.0)) != F.lit(0.0), sum_obj),
        sum_num,
        F.lit(0.0),  # missing amount -> sensible default 0
    ).cast("double")

    # ---- event_date: derive UTC calendar day from whatever field exists ----
    ds = F.coalesce(
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.event_date"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.order_date"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.date"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.ts"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.timestamp"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.event_time"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.created_at"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.order_ts"),
    )

    is_num = ds.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch = ds.cast("double")
    # normalize millis -> seconds, then floor to whole seconds
    secs = F.floor(
        F.when(epoch > F.lit(1.0e12), epoch / F.lit(1000.0)).otherwise(epoch)
    )
    # pure-UTC day math: days since 1970-01-01, no timezone/config involved
    date_epoch = F.when(
        is_num,
        F.date_add(
            F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")),
            F.floor(secs / F.lit(86400.0)).cast("int"),
        ),
    )
    date_str = F.to_date(ds)  # handles 'YYYY-MM-DD' and ISO timestamps

    event_date = F.coalesce(
        date_epoch,
        date_str,
        F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")),  # missing date -> sensible default
    ).cast("date")

    return (
        df.select(event_date.alias("event_date"), revenue.alias("revenue"))
        .groupBy("event_date")
        .agg(F.sum("revenue").cast("double").alias("revenue"))
    )
