from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
         "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/"
         "gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson")

# Type everything as STRING first; validate then cast (so bad values are
# observable, not silently nulled by the JSON parser).
SCHEMA = ("order_id string, id string, amount string, category string, "
          "event_time string, ts string, timestamp string")


@dp.materialized_view(name="scored")
def scored():
    """Parse + score every source line; nothing is dropped here."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)                      # column: value
    df = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA))

    df = df.withColumn("order_id",
                       F.coalesce(F.col("j.order_id"), F.col("j.id")))
    df = df.withColumn("category", F.col("j.category"))
    df = df.withColumn("amount", F.col("j.amount").cast("double"))

    et = F.coalesce(F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.ts"), F.col("j.timestamp"))
    df = df.withColumn("event_time_raw", et)

    is_epoch = F.col("event_time_raw").rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_secs = (F.when(F.length(F.col("event_time_raw")) >= F.lit(13),
                         F.col("event_time_raw").cast("double") / F.lit(1000.0))
                   .otherwise(F.col("event_time_raw").cast("double")))
    # to_timestamp on an ISO string with offset/Z yields a true instant;
    # unix_timestamp gives UTC epoch seconds, independent of session tz.
    iso_secs = F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col("event_time_raw"))).cast("double")

    df = df.withColumn("unix_secs", F.when(is_epoch, epoch_secs).otherwise(iso_secs))
    # UTC calendar day via pure integer day arithmetic — no session-tz dependence.
    df = df.withColumn(
        "event_date",
        F.expr("date_from_unix_date(cast(floor(unix_secs / 86400) as int))"))

    reason = (F.when(F.col("j").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
                .when(F.col("order_id").isNull()
                      | (F.trim(F.col("order_id")) == F.lit("")),
                      F.lit("missing_order_id"))
                .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
                .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_date"))
                .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")))
    df = df.withColumn("reject_reason", reason)

    return df.select("value", "order_id", "amount", "category",
                     "unix_secs", "event_date", "reject_reason")


@dp.materialized_view(name="valid_ranked")
def valid_ranked():
    """Rows passing every expectation, deterministically ranked per order_id."""
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("scored").where(
        F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("unix_secs").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("value").desc())
    return df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    """Keyed by order_id; one survivor per key."""
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("valid_ranked").where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    return df.select("order_id", "amount", "category")


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("valid_ranked").where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    return df.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.col("amount").alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    """Holding area: invalid rows + duplicate (non-survivor) rows, with reason."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    bad = (spark.read.table("scored")
           .where(F.col("reject_reason").isNotNull())
           .select("value", "order_id", "amount", "category",
                   F.col("reject_reason").alias("reason")))
    dups = (spark.read.table("valid_ranked")
            .where(F.col("_rn") > 1)
            .select("value", "order_id", "amount", "category",
                    F.lit("duplicate_order_id").alias("reason")))
    return bad.unionByName(dups)


@dp.materialized_view(name="reconciliation")
def reconciliation():
    """Proof of no loss: kept + rejected == source count."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.table("scored").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    kept = spark.read.table("clean_orders").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("kept_count"))
    rej = spark.read.table("rejected_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("rejected_count"))
    out = src.crossJoin(kept).crossJoin(rej)
    return out.withColumn(
        "reconciled",
        (F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count")) == F.col("source_count"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson"

# Single staged dataset: read raw text, parse generically, validate with
# explicit expectations, normalize event-time to a UTC calendar day WITHOUT
# touching session config, and deterministically resolve duplicates.
@dp.materialized_view(name="staged")
def staged():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(PATH)  # column: value (one JSON object per line)

    # Parse generically so we never silently drop fields; failures -> j is null.
    j = F.from_json(F.col("value"), "map<string,string>")
    df = raw.withColumn("j", j)

    df = (df
          .withColumn("order_id", F.col("j")["order_id"])
          .withColumn("amount_str", F.col("j")["amount"])
          .withColumn("category", F.col("j")["category"])
          .withColumn("event_raw", F.coalesce(
              F.col("j")["event_time"], F.col("j")["ts"],
              F.col("j")["timestamp"], F.col("j")["event_ts"],
              F.col("j")["order_ts"])))

    # amount: type-as-string-first, then cast; garbage -> null -> quarantine.
    amount = F.col("amount_str").cast("double")
    df = df.withColumn("amount", amount)

    # UTC normalization WITHOUT session-tz mutation.
    is_epoch = F.col("event_raw").rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_long = F.col("event_raw").cast("long")
    iso_secs = F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col("event_raw")))
    event_millis = (F.when(is_epoch,
                        F.when(F.length("event_raw") >= F.lit(12), epoch_long)
                         .otherwise(epoch_long * F.lit(1000)))
                     .otherwise(iso_secs * F.lit(1000)))
    df = df.withColumn("event_millis", event_millis)
    # epoch-day arithmetic is timezone-independent -> true UTC calendar day
    day_num = F.floor(F.col("event_millis") / F.lit(86400000)).cast("int")
    df = df.withColumn("event_date", F.date_from_unix_date(day_num))

    # Expectations (do not silently filter — record the reason).
    reason_validity = (
        F.when(F.col("j").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.length(F.trim(F.col("order_id"))) == 0),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_time"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None)))
    df = df.withColumn("reason_validity", reason_validity)
    df = df.withColumn("is_valid", F.col("reason_validity").isNull())

    # Deterministic dedup on the business key (order_id): newest event wins,
    # tie-broken on raw text. Valid rows are ranked first so invalid rows
    # sharing an id never displace a good survivor.
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("is_valid").desc(),
        F.col("event_millis").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("value").desc())
    df = df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    final_reason = (
        F.when(F.col("reason_validity").isNotNull(), F.col("reason_validity"))
         .when(F.col("is_valid") & (F.col("_rn") > 1), F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None)))
    df = df.withColumn("reason", final_reason)

    return df.select(
        "value", "order_id", "amount", "category",
        "event_date", "event_millis", "reason")


# clean_orders: keyed by order_id, carrying amount, category (deduped, valid).
@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    s = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.staged")
    return (s.where(F.col("reason").isNull())
             .select("order_id", "amount", "category"))


# gold_daily: per-order revenue with the UTC event_date.
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    s = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.staged")
    return (s.where(F.col("reason").isNull())
             .select(
                 F.col("event_date").cast("date").alias("event_date"),
                 F.col("amount").alias("revenue"),
                 "order_id", "amount", "category"))


# Holding area / DLQ: every record we could not process, with a reason.
@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    s = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.staged")
    return (s.where(F.col("reason").isNotNull())
             .select(
                 F.col("value").alias("raw_record"),
                 "order_id",
                 "reason"))


# Reconciliation proof: source == kept + rejected (every staged row is in
# exactly one bucket, so this always balances).
@dp.materialized_view(name="audit_reconciliation")
def audit_reconciliation():
    s = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.staged")
    return s.agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("reason").isNull(), 1).otherwise(0)).alias("kept_count"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("reason").isNotNull(), 1).otherwise(0)).alias("rejected_count"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import MapType, StringType

PATH = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
        "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/"
        "gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson")

CAT = "spark_catalog.default."


# ---- bronze: every physical line retained verbatim (source-of-truth count) ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_lines")
def bronze_lines():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    # text read never drops a record -> count(value) == received count
    return spark.read.text(PATH).select(F.col("value"))


# ---- parse + classify (no hard casts; bad input -> reason, not an exception) ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed_orders")
def parsed_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table(CAT + "bronze_lines")

    m = F.from_json(F.col("value"), MapType(StringType(), StringType()))
    df = df.withColumn("m", m)
    mc = F.col("m")

    order_id_raw = F.coalesce(mc.getItem("order_id"), mc.getItem("orderId"),
                              mc.getItem("id"))
    amount_raw = F.coalesce(mc.getItem("amount"), mc.getItem("amt"),
                            mc.getItem("price"))
    category_raw = F.coalesce(mc.getItem("category"), mc.getItem("cat"))
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(mc.getItem("event_date"), mc.getItem("event_ts"),
                        mc.getItem("timestamp"), mc.getItem("ts"),
                        mc.getItem("order_date"), mc.getItem("created_at"))

    df = df.withColumn("order_id",
                       F.expr_or_none if False else
                       F.when(F.trim(order_id_raw) == "", None)
                        .otherwise(F.trim(order_id_raw)))
    df = df.withColumn("amount_raw", amount_raw)
    df = df.withColumn("category",
                       F.when(F.trim(category_raw) == "", None)
                        .otherwise(F.trim(category_raw)))
    df = df.withColumn("ts_raw", ts_raw)

    # numeric clean: strip currency/grouping chars, then try_cast (never throws)
    df = df.withColumn(
        "amount",
        F.expr("try_cast(nullif(regexp_replace(amount_raw, '[^0-9eE+.-]', ''), '') as double)"),
    )

    # date: accept plain dates, ISO timestamps, or epoch seconds -> UTC day
    event_date = F.coalesce(
        F.to_date(F.col("ts_raw")),
        F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col("ts_raw"))),
        F.to_date(F.from_unixtime(F.expr("try_cast(ts_raw as long)"))),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("event_date", event_date)

    reason1 = (
        F.when(F.col("m").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(F.col("order_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_date"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast(StringType()))
    )
    return df.withColumn("reason1", reason1).select(
        "value", "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date", "reason1"
    )


# ---- rank the structurally-valid rows so we can de-dup on the order_id key ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="valid_ranked")
def valid_ranked():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table(CAT + "parsed_orders").where(F.col("reason1").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(F.col("value"))  # deterministic
    return df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))


# ---- clean_orders: one row per order_id key ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (spark.read.table(CAT + "valid_ranked")
            .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
            .select("order_id", "amount", "category"))


# ---- gold_daily: order-grain enriched with the UTC daily revenue rollup ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table(CAT + "valid_ranked").where(F.col("rn") == 1)
    w = Window.partitionBy("event_date")
    return (df.withColumn("revenue", F.sum("amount").over(w))
              .select("event_date", "revenue", "order_id", "amount", "category"))


# ---- rejected holding area: structural rejects + duplicate-key rejects ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    structural = (spark.read.table(CAT + "parsed_orders")
                  .where(F.col("reason1").isNotNull())
                  .select(F.col("order_id"), F.col("value").alias("raw_record"),
                          F.col("reason1").alias("reason")))
    dups = (spark.read.table(CAT + "valid_ranked")
            .where(F.col("rn") > 1)
            .select(F.col("order_id"), F.col("value").alias("raw_record"),
                    F.lit("duplicate_order_id").alias("reason")))
    return structural.unionByName(dups)


# ---- proof: source_count == kept_count + rejected_count ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="recon_check")
def recon_check():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    total = spark.read.table(CAT + "bronze_lines").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    kept = spark.read.table(CAT + "clean_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("kept_count"))
    rej = spark.read.table(CAT + "rejected_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("rejected_count"))
    return (total.crossJoin(kept).crossJoin(rej)
            .withColumn("reconciled",
                        F.col("source_count") == F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"

# ---- field extraction (flexible across messy upstream key spellings) ----
def _derive(raw):
    g = F.get_json_object
    v = F.col("value")

    cid = F.coalesce(g(v, "$.customer_id"), g(v, "$.id"), g(v, "$.cust_id"),
                     g(v, "$.customerId"))
    op_raw = F.lower(F.coalesce(g(v, "$.op"), g(v, "$.operation"),
                                g(v, "$.change_type"), g(v, "$.action"),
                                g(v, "$.event_type")))
    tier = F.coalesce(g(v, "$.tier"), g(v, "$.customer_tier"))
    region = F.coalesce(g(v, "$.region"), g(v, "$.customer_region"))
    ts = F.coalesce(g(v, "$.event_time"), g(v, "$.ts"), g(v, "$.timestamp"),
                    g(v, "$.event_ts"), g(v, "$.time"), g(v, "$.event_timestamp"))
    seq = F.coalesce(g(v, "$.sequence"), g(v, "$.seq"), g(v, "$.offset"),
                     g(v, "$.lsn"), g(v, "$.version"), g(v, "$._seq"),
                     g(v, "$.commit_seq"))

    # normalize CDC operation to add / change / remove
    op_norm = (F.when(op_raw.isin("i", "insert", "c", "create", "add"), F.lit("add"))
                .when(op_raw.isin("u", "update", "change", "modify", "m"), F.lit("change"))
                .when(op_raw.isin("d", "delete", "remove", "r"), F.lit("remove"))
                .otherwise(F.lit(None)))

    # UTC-correct epoch seconds WITHOUT touching session timezone conf.
    is_epoch = ts.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_long = ts.cast("long")
    epoch_sec = (F.when(~is_epoch, F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(ts)))        # ISO-8601
                  .when(F.length(ts) >= F.lit(13), (epoch_long / F.lit(1000)).cast("long"))  # millis
                  .otherwise(epoch_long))                                       # seconds

    # hour bucket via pure epoch math => independent of any session timezone
    hour_epoch = (F.floor(epoch_sec / F.lit(3600)) * F.lit(3600)).cast("long")
    hour_ts = F.timestamp_seconds(hour_epoch)

    # deterministic sequence key for ordering/dedup
    seq_long = F.coalesce(seq.cast("long"), epoch_sec)

    return raw.select(
        v.alias("value"),
        cid.alias("customer_id"),
        op_norm.alias("op_norm"),
        tier.alias("tier"),
        region.alias("region"),
        epoch_sec.alias("epoch_sec"),
        seq_long.alias("seq_long"),
        hour_ts.alias("hour_ts"),
    )


def _is_valid():
    return (F.col("customer_id").isNotNull()
            & F.col("op_norm").isNotNull()
            & F.col("epoch_sec").isNotNull())


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_quarantine")
def cdc_quarantine():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(PATH)
    return _derive(raw).where(~_is_valid()).select("value")


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_clean")
def cdc_clean():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(PATH)
    d = _derive(raw).where(_is_valid())
    # collapse exact duplicate emissions of the same change (customer_id, seq):
    # keeps reprocessing totals stable (idempotent), tie-broken deterministically.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id", "seq_long").orderBy(
        F.col("epoch_sec").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("op_norm").asc())
    return (d.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
             .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
             .drop("_rn"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_clean")
    # latest change per customer, by sequence then event time (deterministic)
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("seq_long").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("epoch_sec").desc_nulls_last())
    latest = (df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))
    # a customer whose latest op is a removal is not in current state
    return (latest.where(F.col("op_norm") != F.lit("remove"))
                  .select("customer_id", "tier", "region"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_clean")
    agg = (df.groupBy("hour_ts", "region").agg(
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "add", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("added"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "change", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("changed"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "remove", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),
    ))
    # net = added - removed; summed across hours per region reconciles to
    # customers_current counts, and added+changed+removed reconciles to source.
    return agg.select(
        F.col("hour_ts").alias("hour"),
        "region", "added", "changed", "removed",
        (F.col("added") - F.col("removed")).alias("net_change"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
         "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/"
         "gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson")

# Type external columns as STRINGS first (validate, then cast) so bad values
# do not silently become nulls and vanish from aggregates.
SCHEMA = (
    "customer_id string, op string, operation string, change_type string, "
    "event_time string, ts string, timestamp string, event_ts string, "
    "tier string, region string, seq string, sequence string, version string"
)


def _enriched():
    """Parse + normalize. Builds an UNRESOLVED plan only (no actions)."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)                       # column: value
    j = F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA)
    base = (raw.withColumn("j", j)
               .withColumn("_json_ok", F.col("j").isNotNull())
               .select(F.col("value").alias("_raw"), "_json_ok", "j.*"))

    op = F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce("op", "operation", "change_type")))
    et = F.coalesce("event_time", "ts", "timestamp", "event_ts")
    seq_raw = F.coalesce("seq", "sequence", "version")

    # UTC normalization without mutating session conf: branch epoch vs ISO.
    is_epoch = et.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    ev_long = et.cast("long")
    event_ts = (F.when(is_epoch & (ev_long > F.lit(99999999999)),
                       F.timestamp_millis(ev_long))            # epoch millis
                  .when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_seconds(ev_long))  # epoch seconds
                  .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(et)))                # ISO-8601

    op_class = (F.when(op.isin("insert", "i", "add", "c", "create"), F.lit("added"))
                  .when(op.isin("update", "u", "change", "m", "upsert"), F.lit("changed"))
                  .when(op.isin("delete", "d", "remove", "r"), F.lit("removed"))
                  .otherwise(F.lit(None)))

    enr = (base
           .withColumn("op_class", op_class)
           .withColumn("event_ts", event_ts)
           .withColumn("seq_long", seq_raw.cast("long")))

    # Cast-to-long of a timestamp == UTC epoch seconds, independent of session TZ.
    epoch_seconds = F.col("event_ts").cast("long")
    hour_epoch = (F.floor(epoch_seconds / F.lit(3600)) * F.lit(3600)).cast("long")
    enr = enr.withColumn("hour", F.timestamp_seconds(hour_epoch))

    # Expectations: required key, parseable time, recognized op.
    is_clean = (F.col("_json_ok")
                & F.col("customer_id").isNotNull()
                & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
                & F.col("op_class").isNotNull())
    return enr.withColumn("_is_clean", is_clean)


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_clean")
def cdc_clean():
    """Clean CDC changes, deterministically deduped one row per (customer, seq)."""
    enr = _enriched().where(F.col("_is_clean"))
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id", "seq_long").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_raw").desc())
    dedup = (enr.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))
    return dedup.select("customer_id", "tier", "region",
                        "op_class", "event_ts", "hour", "seq_long")


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_quarantine")
def cdc_quarantine():
    """Rows that failed parse/expectations — loss stays observable."""
    enr = _enriched().where(~F.col("_is_clean"))
    return enr.select(F.col("_raw").alias("value"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    """Reconciled current state: latest change per customer, minus removals."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    clean = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_clean")
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("seq_long").desc_nulls_last())
    latest = (clean.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                   .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))
    return (latest.where(F.col("op_class") != F.lit("removed"))
                  .select("customer_id", "tier", "region"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    """Hourly add/change/remove counts per region.
    Built from the same deduped clean events that drive customers_current, so
    sum(added) - sum(removed) reconciles to the current-state row count and to
    the source; reprocessing the same input is stable (deterministic dedup)."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    clean = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_clean")
    return (clean.groupBy("hour", "region").agg(
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_class") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("added"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_class") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("changed"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_class") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),
    ))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"


def _g(*paths):
    # robust extraction across possible upstream field names; fully lazy
    return F.coalesce(*[F.get_json_object(F.col("value"), p) for p in paths])


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_events")
def cdc_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    # read raw text -> NO schema inference -> no analysis triggered
    raw = spark.read.text(PATH)

    df = raw.select(
        _g("$.customer_id", "$.id", "$.cust_id", "$.customerId").alias("customer_id"),
        _g("$.tier", "$.customer_tier", "$.new_tier").alias("tier"),
        _g("$.region", "$.customer_region", "$.new_region").alias("region"),
        _g("$.op", "$.operation", "$.change_type", "$._op", "$.action",
           "$.cdc_op", "$.event_type", "$.kind").alias("op"),
        _g("$.ts", "$.timestamp", "$.event_time", "$.event_ts", "$.changed_at",
           "$.time", "$.event_timestamp", "$.updated_at").alias("ts"),
    ).where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())

    opl = F.lower(F.trim(F.col("op")))
    category = (
        F.when(opl.isin("i", "ins", "insert", "add", "added", "c", "create", "created"), "added")
         .when(opl.isin("u", "upd", "update", "updated", "change", "changed", "modify", "m"), "changed")
         .when(opl.isin("d", "del", "delete", "deleted", "remove", "removed"), "removed")
         .otherwise("changed")
    )

    # parse timestamp: ISO strings first, then epoch millis/seconds
    ts_ts = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("ts")),
        F.timestamp_millis(F.col("ts").cast("long")),
        F.timestamp_seconds(F.col("ts").cast("long")),
    )

    out = (
        df.withColumn("category", category)
          .withColumn("event_ts", ts_ts)
          .withColumn("hour", F.date_format(F.date_trunc("hour", ts_ts), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:00:00"))
          # idempotency: collapse duplicate CDC emissions so totals are stable
          .dropDuplicates(["customer_id", "ts", "op"])
    )
    return out


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("cdc_events")

    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("category").desc(),
        F.col("tier").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("region").desc_nulls_last(),
    )

    latest = e.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)

    # reconciled current state: drop customers whose latest change was a removal
    return (
        latest.where(F.col("category") != "removed")
              .select("customer_id", "tier", "region")
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("cdc_events")

    return (
        e.groupBy("hour", "region").agg(
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("category") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("added"),
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("category") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("changed"),
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("category") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),
        )
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp

DATA = (

])

_op = F.lower(F.trim(F.col("op")))
IS_ADD = _op.isin("insert", "add", "create", "i", "c", "r")
IS_CHG = _op.isin("update", "change", "u")
IS_REM = _op.isin("delete", "remove", "d")


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_events_dedup")

    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)
    # Idempotency: collapse exact / replayed duplicates by natural CDC key.
    deduped = raw.dropDuplicates(["customer_id", "seq", "op"])
    return (
        deduped
        .withColumn("event_hour", F.date_trunc("hour", F.to_timestamp(F.col("ts"))))

    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_events_dedup")
    # Latest event per customer (deterministic tie-break) defines current state.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_hour").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    latest = e.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    # A customer whose most recent op is a removal is no longer current.
    return (
        latest
        .where(F.col("is_rem") == 0)
        .select("customer_id", "tier", "region")
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_events_dedup")
    return (
        e.groupBy("event_hour", "region")
        .agg(
            F.sum("is_add").alias("added"),
            F.sum("is_chg").alias("changed"),
            F.sum("is_rem").alias("removed"),
        )
        .select("event_hour", "region", "added", "changed", "removed")
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

DATA_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"

# Type EVERY external column as string first; validate, then cast (spark-safety §4).
SCHEMA = (
    "event_id string, id string, txn_id string, settlement_id string, "
    "amount string, native_amount string, settled_value string, "
    "usd_amount string, usd_value string, usd_total string, settled_usd string, "
    "currency string, ccy string, "
    "rate string, fx_rate string, rate_to_usd string, usd_rate string, "
    "event_time string, timestamp string, ts string, "
    "settlement_date string, date string, "
    "source string, feed string, type string"
)


def _enrich(df):
    """Pure plan-building (no actions): normalize, derive UTC day, value in USD."""
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_id",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("j.event_id"), F.col("j.id"), F.col("j.txn_id"),
            F.col("j.settlement_id"), F.sha2(F.col("_raw"), 256),
        ),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_currency", F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("j.currency"), F.col("j.ccy"))))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_native",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("j.amount").cast("double"),
            F.col("j.native_amount").cast("double"),
            F.col("j.settled_value").cast("double"),
        ),
    )
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_rate",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("j.rate").cast("double"), F.col("j.fx_rate").cast("double"),
            F.col("j.rate_to_usd").cast("double"), F.col("j.usd_rate").cast("double"),
        ),
    )
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_usd_direct",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("j.usd_amount").cast("double"), F.col("j.usd_value").cast("double"),
            F.col("j.usd_total").cast("double"), F.col("j.settled_usd").cast("double"),
        ),
    )
    # UTC event-time normalization handling BOTH epoch and ISO forms (spark-safety §3).
    df = df.withColumn("_et", F.coalesce(F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.ts")))
    df = df.withColumn("_is_epoch", F.col("_et").rlike("^[0-9]+$"))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_epoch_seconds",
        F.when(F.col("_is_epoch") & (F.length("_et") >= F.lit(13)),
               F.col("_et").cast("long") / F.lit(1000.0))
         .when(F.col("_is_epoch"), F.col("_et").cast("long").cast("double"))
         .otherwise(F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col("_et"))).cast("double")),
    )
    # UTC calendar day via pure epoch arithmetic -> independent of session timezone,
    # so we never need to mutate spark.sql.session.timeZone (gate-blocked).
    df = df.withColumn("_utc_day", F.floor(F.col("_epoch_seconds") / F.lit(86400.0)).cast("int"))
    df = df.withColumn("_date_from_ts", F.expr("date_add(DATE '1970-01-01', _utc_day)"))
    df = df.withColumn("_date_str", F.coalesce(F.col("j.settlement_date"), F.col("j.date")))
    df = df.withColumn("settlement_date", F.coalesce(F.to_date(F.col("_date_str")), F.col("_date_from_ts")))

    df = df.withColumn("usd_value", F.coalesce(F.col("_usd_direct"), F.col("_native") * F.col("_rate")))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "is_external",
        F.coalesce(
            F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("j.source"), F.col("j.feed"), F.col("j.type")))
             .rlike("bank|external|settle"),
            F.lit(False),
        ),
    )
    # Expectations: date + currency + a derivable USD value are required.
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_valid",
        F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
        & F.col("_currency").isNotNull()
        & F.col("usd_value").isNotNull(),
    )
    return df


@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed")
def parsed():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(DATA_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("_raw"))
    return raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("_raw"), SCHEMA))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_quarantine")
def settlement_quarantine():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.parsed")
    enriched = _enrich(src.where(F.col("j").isNotNull()))
    bad_json = src.where(F.col("j").isNull()).select("_raw")
    bad_rows = enriched.where(~F.col("_valid")).select("_raw")
    return bad_json.unionByName(bad_rows)


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_events")
def clean_events():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.parsed")
    enriched = _enrich(src.where(F.col("j").isNotNull())).where(F.col("_valid"))
    # Deterministic dedup on a real sequence key (spark-safety §2).
    w = Window.partitionBy("_id", "is_external").orderBy(
        F.col("_epoch_seconds").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_raw").desc()
    )
    deduped = enriched.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    return deduped.select(
        F.col("settlement_date"),
        F.col("_currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("usd_value"),
        F.col("is_external"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    ce = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_events")
    return (
        ce.where(~F.col("is_external"))
          .groupBy("settlement_date")
          .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_currency_daily")
def settlement_currency_daily():
    ce = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_events")
    return (
        ce.where(~F.col("is_external"))
          .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
          .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    ce = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_events")
    internal = (
        ce.where(~F.col("is_external"))
          .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
          .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("internal_usd"))
    )
    external = (
        ce.where(F.col("is_external"))
          .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
          .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("external_usd"))
    )
    recon = internal.join(external, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    recon = recon.withColumn(
        "usd_diff",
        F.round(
            F.coalesce(F.col("internal_usd"), F.lit(0.0))
            - F.coalesce(F.col("external_usd"), F.lit(0.0)),
            2,
        ),
    )
    recon = recon.withColumn(
        "status",
        F.when(F.col("internal_usd").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_INTERNAL"))
         .when(F.col("external_usd").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_EXTERNAL"))
         .when(F.abs(F.col("usd_diff")) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("MATCH"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("MISMATCH")),
    )
    return recon.select(
        "settlement_date", "currency", "internal_usd", "external_usd", "usd_diff", "status"
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"

# Type EVERYTHING as STRING first, then validate+cast (spark-safety #4):
# typing numerics/timestamps in the schema turns bad values into silent nulls.
SCHEMA = (
    "event_id STRING, txn_id STRING, event_time STRING, currency STRING, "
    "amount STRING, fx_rate STRING, rate STRING, usd_amount STRING, "
    "source STRING, feed STRING"
)


def _utc_event_date(col):
    """UTC calendar day, computed WITHOUT relying on session timezone.

    - epoch (all digits): treat as ms-since-UTC-epoch -> day via integer division.
    - ISO-8601 (assumed UTC / 'Z'): the leading 10 chars are the UTC date.
    """
    is_epoch = col.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    days = (col.cast("long") / F.lit(86400000)).cast("long")  # floor for >=0
    epoch_date = F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), days.cast("int"))
    iso_date = F.to_date(F.substring(col, 1, 10))
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_date).otherwise(iso_date)


def _parsed(spark):
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)                       # column: value
    return raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json("value", SCHEMA))


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Quarantine: rows that fail to parse or violate validity expectations.
# rows_in == clean + quarantined ; nothing is lost without a trace.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_quarantine")
def settlement_quarantine():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = _parsed(spark)
    j = F.col("j")
    bad_parse = j.isNull()
    event_date = _utc_event_date(j["event_time"])
    amount = j["amount"].cast("double")
    currency = F.upper(j["currency"])
    bad = (
        bad_parse
        | event_date.isNull()
        | amount.isNull()
        | currency.isNull()
    )
    return p.where(bad).select("value")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Clean, deduplicated facts (deterministic survivor per business key).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_clean")
def settlement_clean():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = _parsed(spark)
    j = F.col("j")

    df = p.select(
        j["event_id"].alias("event_id"),
        j["txn_id"].alias("txn_id"),
        j["event_time"].alias("event_time"),
        F.upper(j["currency"]).alias("currency"),
        j["amount"].cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.coalesce(j["fx_rate"], j["rate"]).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        j["usd_amount"].cast("double").alias("usd_amount"),
        F.lower(F.coalesce(j["source"], j["feed"], F.lit(""))).alias("source"),
        F.col("value"),
    ).withColumn("settlement_date", _utc_event_date(F.col("event_time")))

    # Expectations: keep only fully-valid rows (failures went to quarantine).
    valid = df.where(
        F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
        & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
        & F.col("amount").isNotNull()
    )

    # USD conversion at the rate effective that day; USD passes through at 1.0.
    rate_eff = F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("rate"))
    valid = valid.withColumn(
        "usd_value",
        F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("amount") * rate_eff),
    ).withColumn("is_bank", (F.col("source") == "bank"))

    # Deterministic dedup on explicit business key + event-time ordering.
    bkey = F.coalesce(F.col("event_id"), F.col("txn_id"), F.col("value"))
    w = Window.partitionBy(bkey).orderBy(
        F.col("event_time").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("value").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    return (
        valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn")
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CONTRACT: settlement_daily(settlement_date DATE [UTC day], usd_total)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_clean")
    ours = src.where(~F.col("is_bank") & F.col("usd_value").isNotNull())
    return (
        ours.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
        .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"), "usd_total")
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Per-currency breakdown (native + USD), per UTC day.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_clean")
    ours = src.where(~F.col("is_bank"))
    return (
        ours.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
        .agg(
            F.round(F.sum("amount"), 2).alias("native_total"),
            F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"),
            "currency",
            "native_total",
            "usd_total",
        )
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Reconciliation against the external (bank) settlements feed, line by line.
# Full-outer join surfaces both off-by amounts AND currencies missing on a side.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_clean")

    ours = (
        src.where(~F.col("is_bank"))
        .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("our_usd"))
    )
    bank = (
        src.where(F.col("is_bank"))
        .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("bank_usd"))
    )

    j = ours.join(bank, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    diff = F.round(
        F.coalesce(F.col("our_usd"), F.lit(0.0)) - F.coalesce(F.col("bank_usd"), F.lit(0.0)),
        2,
    )
    status = (
        F.when(F.col("our_usd").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_INTERNAL"))
        .when(F.col("bank_usd").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_BANK"))
        .when(F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("MATCH"))
        .otherwise(F.lit("MISMATCH"))
    )
    return j.select(
        F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"),
        "currency",
        F.coalesce(F.col("our_usd"), F.lit(0.0)).alias("our_usd"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("bank_usd"), F.lit(0.0)).alias("bank_usd"),
        diff.alias("usd_diff"),
        status.alias("recon_status"),
    )
