from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

CLICK = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_clickstream_seed1337.ndjson"
CDC = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"

CLICK_SCHEMA = (
    "user_id string, userId string, uid string, "
    "event_id string, eventId string, id string, "
    "event_type string, event string, stage string, action string, type string, "
    "event_time string, timestamp string, ts string, time string"
)

CDC_SCHEMA = (
    "user_id string, customer_id string, id string, uid string, "
    "name string, customer_name string, full_name string, "
    "country string, region string, tier string, segment string, plan string, "
    "updated_at string, updated_ts string, timestamp string, ts string, "
    "op string, operation string"
)


def to_ts(colname):
    """Deterministic UTC-stable parse: epoch (s/ms) or ISO-8601. No session-conf mutation."""
    s = F.col(colname)
    is_epoch = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    return (
        F.when(is_epoch & (F.length(s) >= 12), F.timestamp_millis(s.cast("long")))
        .when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_seconds(s.cast("long")))
        .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(s))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_parsed")
def silver_parsed():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(CLICK)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), CLICK_SCHEMA))
    df = df.select(
        F.col("value"),
        F.col("j").isNotNull().alias("parse_ok"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.user_id"), F.col("j.userId"), F.col("j.uid")).alias("user_id"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.event_id"), F.col("j.eventId"), F.col("j.id")).alias("event_id"),
        F.lower(
            F.trim(
                F.coalesce(
                    F.col("j.event_type"), F.col("j.event"), F.col("j.stage"),
                    F.col("j.action"), F.col("j.type"),
                )
            )
        ).alias("stage"),
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.ts"), F.col("j.time")
        ).alias("event_time_raw"),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("event_ts", to_ts("event_time_raw"))
    valid_stage = F.col("stage").isin("view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase")
    is_clean = (
        F.col("parse_ok")
        & F.col("user_id").isNotNull()
        & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
        & valid_stage
    )
    return df.withColumn("is_clean", is_clean)


@dp.materialized_view(name="held_events")
def held_events():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("silver_parsed")
    return df.where(~F.col("is_clean")).select("value")


@dp.materialized_view(name="dim_customers_current")
def dim_customers_current():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(CDC)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), CDC_SCHEMA))
    df = df.where(F.col("j").isNotNull()).select(
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.user_id"), F.col("j.customer_id"), F.col("j.id"), F.col("j.uid")).alias("cust_id"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.name"), F.col("j.customer_name"), F.col("j.full_name")).alias("cust_name"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.country"), F.col("j.region")).alias("cust_country"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.tier"), F.col("j.segment"), F.col("j.plan")).alias("cust_tier"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.updated_at"), F.col("j.updated_ts"), F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.ts")).alias("updated_raw"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.op"), F.col("j.operation")).alias("op"),
        F.col("value"),
    )
    df = df.where(F.col("cust_id").isNotNull()).withColumn("updated_ts", to_ts("updated_raw"))
    w = Window.partitionBy("cust_id").orderBy(
        F.col("updated_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("value").desc()
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    return df.select("cust_id", "cust_name", "cust_country", "cust_tier")


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("silver_parsed").where(F.col("is_clean"))
    cust = SparkSession.active().read.table("dim_customers_current")

    order = [F.col("event_ts").asc(), F.col("event_id").asc_nulls_last()]
    w_order = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(*order)
    w_run = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(*order).rowsBetween(
        Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow
    )

    prev_ts = F.lag("event_ts").over(w_order)
    gap = F.col("event_ts").cast("long") - prev_ts.cast("long")
    new_visit = F.when(prev_ts.isNull() | (gap > 1800), 1).otherwise(0)

    df = df.withColumn("new_visit", new_visit)
    df = df.withColumn("visit_num", F.sum("new_visit").over(w_run))
    df = df.withColumn("visit_id", F.concat_ws("-", F.col("user_id"), F.col("visit_num").cast("string")))

    enriched = df.join(cust, df["user_id"] == cust["cust_id"], "left")
    return enriched.select(
        F.col("user_id"),
        F.col("event_id"),
        F.col("stage"),
        F.col("event_ts"),
        F.col("visit_id"),
        F.col("cust_name"),
        F.col("cust_country"),
        F.col("cust_tier"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("silver_sessions")
    return df.groupBy("stage").agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Inputs (this seed)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
CLICKS_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_clickstream_seed2718.ndjson"
CDC_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

# Read every external field as a STRING first (validate, then cast) so a bad
# value becomes an observable quarantine row rather than a silent null.
CLICK_SCHEMA = (
    "user_id string, user string, uid string, "
    "event_time string, event_ts string, ts string, timestamp string, time string, "
    "event_type string, stage string, event string, action string, type string, "
    "event_id string, id string"
)

CDC_SCHEMA = (
    "user_id string, user string, uid string, "
    "name string, email string, country string, region string, "
    "plan string, segment string, "
    "updated_at string, ts string, timestamp string, seq string, _seq string, op string"
)

CATALOG = "spark_catalog.default"
GAP_SECONDS = 30 * 60
STAGES = ["view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase"]


def parse_ts(col):
    """UTC-correct normalization of a mixed epoch / ISO event-time string.

    Epoch is read as a numeric string and converted to a UTC instant
    (millis vs seconds detected by digit length); ISO-8601 falls through
    to to_timestamp. We avoid mutating any session conf (not allowed in a
    declarative pipeline) by deriving instants directly.
    """
    is_epoch = col.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_long = col.cast("long")
    ts_epoch = F.when(F.length(col) >= F.lit(12), F.timestamp_millis(epoch_long)) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(epoch_long))
    return (
        F.when(col.isNull(), F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
         .when(is_epoch, ts_epoch)
         .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(col))
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Bronze: parse raw clickstream text, keep original line for reconciliation
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks")
def bronze_clicks():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(CLICKS_PATH)
    j = F.from_json(F.col("value"), CLICK_SCHEMA)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", j)
    user_id = F.coalesce(j["user_id"], j["user"], j["uid"])
    et_raw = F.coalesce(j["event_time"], j["event_ts"], j["ts"], j["timestamp"], j["time"])
    stage = F.lower(F.coalesce(j["event_type"], j["stage"], j["event"], j["action"], j["type"]))
    event_id = F.coalesce(j["event_id"], j["id"])
    return df.select(
        F.col("value"),
        F.col("j"),
        user_id.alias("user_id"),
        et_raw.alias("event_time_raw"),
        stage.alias("stage"),
        event_id.alias("event_id"),
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Holding area: unparseable / contract-violating rows (observable loss)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="clicks_quarantine")
def clicks_quarantine():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table(f"{CATALOG}.bronze_clicks")
    ts = parse_ts(F.col("event_time_raw"))
    bad = F.col("j").isNull() | F.col("user_id").isNull() | ts.isNull()
    return src.where(bad).select(F.col("value"))


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Current customer profile (CDC -> latest version per user, deterministic)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CDC_PATH)
    j = F.from_json(F.col("value"), CDC_SCHEMA)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", j).where(F.col("j").isNotNull())
    user_id = F.coalesce(j["user_id"], j["user"], j["uid"])
    seq_raw = F.coalesce(j["updated_at"], j["ts"], j["timestamp"], j["seq"], j["_seq"])
    ts = parse_ts(seq_raw)
    flat = df.select(
        user_id.alias("user_id"),
        ts.alias("_ts"),
        seq_raw.alias("_seq_raw"),
        j["name"].alias("name"),
        F.coalesce(j["country"], j["region"]).alias("country"),
        F.coalesce(j["plan"], j["segment"]).alias("plan"),
    ).where(F.col("user_id").isNotNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(
        F.col("_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_seq_raw").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    cur = flat.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    return cur.select("user_id", "name", "country", "plan")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Silver: clean events assigned to a visit (30-min inactivity gap) + enriched.
# Batch read => late events are naturally included; reprocessing is stable.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.table(f"{CATALOG}.bronze_clicks")
    ts = parse_ts(F.col("event_time_raw"))
    clean = (
        src.where(F.col("j").isNotNull() & F.col("user_id").isNotNull() & ts.isNotNull())
           .withColumn("event_ts", ts)
           .withColumn("event_unix", F.unix_timestamp(ts))
    )

    order_w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy("event_unix")
    prev = F.lag("event_unix").over(order_w)
    new_sess = F.when(prev.isNull() | ((F.col("event_unix") - prev) > F.lit(GAP_SECONDS)), 1).otherwise(0)
    run_w = (Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy("event_unix")
                   .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow))
    clean = (
        clean.withColumn("_new", new_sess)
             .withColumn("visit_index", F.sum("_new").over(run_w))
             .withColumn("visit_id", F.concat(F.col("user_id"), F.lit("#v"), F.col("visit_index")))
    )

    prof = spark.read.table(f"{CATALOG}.customers_current")
    enriched = clean.join(prof, on="user_id", how="left")
    return enriched.select(
        "user_id",
        "visit_id",
        "event_ts",
        "stage",
        "event_id",
        "name",
        "country",
        "plan",
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Gold: distinct-user funnel per stage
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    s = spark.read.table(f"{CATALOG}.silver_sessions")
    valid = s.where(F.col("stage").isin(STAGES))
    return valid.groupBy("stage").agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

CLICK_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_clickstream_seed1337.ndjson"
CDC_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"

# Permissive, field-name-tolerant schemas (parse each line as JSON; unknown -> null).
CLICK_FIELDS = [
    "user_id", "userId", "uid", "user", "customer_id",
    "event_id", "id", "click_id",
    "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "time", "event_ts",
    "event", "event_type", "stage", "action", "type",
]
CLICK_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(f, StringType(), True) for f in CLICK_FIELDS])

CDC_FIELDS = [
    "customer_id", "user_id", "uid", "id",
    "name", "full_name", "first_name", "last_name",
    "email", "country", "city", "tier", "segment", "plan",
    "updated_at", "effective_ts", "valid_from", "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "op",
]
CDC_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(f, StringType(), True) for f in CDC_FIELDS])


def _parse_ts(col):
    """Parse ISO timestamps OR epoch (seconds / millis) defensively."""
    d = col.cast("double")
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(col),
        F.when(d > F.lit(1e12), F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(d / F.lit(1000.0)))),
        F.when(d > F.lit(1e9), F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(d))),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks")
def bronze_clicks():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    # One row per source line => exact source count, nothing dropped.
    raw = spark.read.text(CLICK_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw_line"))
    p = F.from_json(F.col("raw_line"), CLICK_SCHEMA)

    user_id = F.coalesce(p["user_id"], p["userId"], p["uid"], p["user"], p["customer_id"])
    event_id = F.coalesce(p["event_id"], p["id"], p["click_id"])
    raw_ts = F.coalesce(p["ts"], p["timestamp"], p["event_time"], p["time"], p["event_ts"])
    raw_stage = F.coalesce(p["event"], p["event_type"], p["stage"], p["action"], p["type"])
    event_ts = _parse_ts(raw_ts)

    s = F.lower(raw_stage)
    stage = (
        F.when(s.contains("view"), F.lit("view"))
        .when(s.contains("cart"), F.lit("cart"))
        .when(s.contains("checkout"), F.lit("checkout"))
        .when(s.contains("purchase") | s.contains("buy") | s.contains("order"), F.lit("purchase"))
        .otherwise(s)
    )

    df = raw.select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        user_id.alias("user_id"),
        event_id.alias("event_id"),
        raw_ts.alias("raw_ts"),
        event_ts.alias("event_ts"),
        raw_stage.alias("raw_stage"),
        stage.alias("stage"),
    )
    # Valid = parsed AND has the minimum keys needed to place the click.
    return df.withColumn(
        "is_valid", F.col("user_id").isNotNull() & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="held_events")
def held_events():
    # Holding area: every unparseable / unplaceable line, kept once.
    return (
        SparkSession.active()
        .read.table("bronze_clicks")
        .where(~F.col("is_valid"))
        .select("raw_line", "raw_ts", "raw_stage")
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_current")
def cdc_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CDC_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw_line"))
    p = F.from_json(F.col("raw_line"), CDC_SCHEMA)

    p_user = F.coalesce(p["customer_id"], p["user_id"], p["uid"], p["id"])
    p_eff = _parse_ts(
        F.coalesce(p["updated_at"], p["effective_ts"], p["valid_from"],
                   p["ts"], p["timestamp"], p["event_time"])
    )
    p_name = F.coalesce(p["name"], F.concat_ws(" ", p["first_name"], p["last_name"]), p["full_name"])

    df = raw.select(
        p_user.alias("p_user"),
        p_eff.alias("p_eff_ts"),
        p_name.alias("profile_name"),
        p["email"].alias("profile_email"),
        p["country"].alias("profile_country"),
        F.coalesce(p["tier"], p["segment"], p["plan"]).alias("profile_tier"),
    ).where(F.col("p_user").isNotNull())

    # Current profile = latest CDC record per user (deterministic tie-break).
    w = Window.partitionBy("p_user").orderBy(
        F.col("p_eff_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("profile_name").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("profile_email").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    return df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("rn") == 1).drop("rn")


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    clean = spark.read.table("bronze_clicks").where(F.col("is_valid"))

    # Sessionize by EVENT time so late-arriving clicks land in the right visit.
    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(F.col("event_ts").asc())
    df = clean.withColumn("prev_ts", F.lag("event_ts").over(w))
    gap = F.col("event_ts").cast("long") - F.col("prev_ts").cast("long")
    df = df.withColumn(
        "new_session",
        F.when(F.col("prev_ts").isNull() | (gap > F.lit(1800)), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0)),
    )
    wc = (
        Window.partitionBy("user_id")
        .orderBy(F.col("event_ts").asc())
        .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
    )
    df = df.withColumn("session_num", F.sum("new_session").over(wc))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "visit_id", F.concat_ws("-", F.col("user_id"), F.col("session_num").cast("string"))
    )

    # Enrich with the user's current profile.
    cdc = spark.read.table("cdc_current")
    j = df.join(cdc, df["user_id"] == cdc["p_user"], "left")
    return j.select(
        F.col("user_id"),
        F.col("event_id"),
        F.col("event_ts"),
        F.col("stage"),
        F.col("raw_stage"),
        F.col("visit_id"),
        F.col("session_num"),
        F.col("profile_name"),
        F.col("profile_email"),
        F.col("profile_country"),
        F.col("profile_tier"),
        F.col("raw_line"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    s = spark.read.table("silver_sessions")

    counts = (
        s.where(F.col("stage").isin("view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase"))
        .groupBy("stage")
        .agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))
    )
    # Guarantee all four stages appear, even with zero users.
    base = spark.range(4).withColumn(
        "stage",
        F.element_at(
            F.array(F.lit("view"), F.lit("cart"), F.lit("checkout"), F.lit("purchase")),
            (F.col("id") + F.lit(1)).cast("int"),
        ),
    )
    out = (
        base.select("stage")
        .join(counts, "stage", "left")
        .withColumn("users", F.coalesce(F.col("users"), F.lit(0)).cast("long"))
    )
    return out.select("stage", "users")

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import MapType, StringType

CLICK_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_clickstream_seed2718.ndjson"
CUST_PATH  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

MAP = MapType(StringType(), StringType())


def _pick(mcol, keys):
    return F.coalesce(*[mcol.getItem(k) for k in keys])


def _to_ts(ts_str):
    # numeric epoch (sec or ms) OR ISO/string timestamp
    is_num = ts_str.rlike(r"^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$")
    intpart = F.regexp_replace(ts_str, r"\..*$", "")
    epoch = ts_str.cast("double")
    secs = F.when(F.length(intpart) >= 13, epoch / 1000.0).otherwise(epoch)
    ts_from_epoch = F.timestamp_seconds(secs)
    ts_iso = F.to_timestamp(ts_str)
    return F.when(is_num, ts_from_epoch).otherwise(ts_iso)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Parse the clickstream. Every text line becomes exactly one row so that
#    valid + held always reconcile to the source line count.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="clicks_parsed")
def clicks_parsed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CLICK_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw"))
    m = F.from_json(F.col("raw"), MAP)

    user_id = _pick(m, ["user_id", "userId", "uid", "user",
                        "customer_id", "customerId", "custId"])
    ts_str = _pick(m, ["timestamp", "ts", "event_time", "eventTime", "time",
                       "event_timestamp", "created_at", "occurred_at"])
    stage_raw = _pick(m, ["event", "event_type", "eventType", "stage",
                          "type", "action"])

    event_ts = _to_ts(ts_str)
    sn = F.lower(F.trim(stage_raw))
    stage = (F.when(sn.rlike("view"), F.lit("view"))
              .when(sn.rlike("cart"), F.lit("cart"))
              .when(sn.rlike("checkout"), F.lit("checkout"))
              .when(sn.rlike("purchase|buy|order"), F.lit("purchase")))

    df = (raw
          .withColumn("m", m)
          .withColumn("user_id", user_id)
          .withColumn("ts_str", ts_str)
          .withColumn("stage_raw", stage_raw)
          .withColumn("event_ts", event_ts)
          .withColumn("stage", stage))

    # A click is usable iff JSON parsed AND we can place it (user + time).
    is_valid = (F.col("m").isNotNull()
                & F.col("user_id").isNotNull()
                & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull())
    return df.withColumn("is_valid", is_valid)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Current profile per user from the CDC feed (latest, non-deleted record).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CUST_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw"))
    m = F.from_json(F.col("raw"), MAP)

    cust_id = _pick(m, ["customer_id", "user_id", "userId", "id", "custId", "uid"])
    op = F.lower(F.trim(_pick(m, ["op", "operation", "_change_type",
                                  "change_type", "_op"])))
    ord_str = _pick(m, ["version", "seq", "sequence", "lsn", "_commit_ts",
                        "updated_at", "modified_at", "ts", "timestamp"])
    is_num = ord_str.rlike(r"^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$")
    order_key = F.when(is_num, ord_str.cast("double")).otherwise(
        _to_ts(ord_str).cast("double"))

    df = (raw
          .withColumn("cust_id", cust_id)
          .withColumn("op", op)
          .withColumn("order_key", order_key)
          .withColumn("p_country", _pick(m, ["country", "region", "geo"]))
          .withColumn("p_plan", _pick(m, ["plan", "tier", "plan_name", "subscription"]))
          .withColumn("p_name", _pick(m, ["name", "full_name", "fullName", "username"]))
          .withColumn("p_email", _pick(m, ["email", "email_address"]))
          .where(F.col("cust_id").isNotNull()))

    w = Window.partitionBy("cust_id").orderBy(
        F.col("order_key").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("raw").desc())
    latest = (df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
                .where(~F.col("op").isin("d", "delete", "del", "remove", "_delete")))

    return latest.select(
        F.col("cust_id").alias("user_id"),
        "p_country", "p_plan", "p_name", "p_email")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. silver_sessions: every clean event assigned to a visit (30-min gap rule),
#    enriched with current profile. Batch => no late events dropped.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = (spark.read.table("clicks_parsed")
          .where(F.col("is_valid"))
          .withColumn("event_ts_long", F.col("event_ts").cast("long")))

    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts_long").asc(), F.col("raw").asc())
    prev = F.lag("event_ts_long").over(w)
    new_visit = F.when(prev.isNull() | ((F.col("event_ts_long") - prev) > 1800),
                       F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0))
    wc = w.rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
    visit_num = F.sum(new_visit).over(wc)

    sessioned = (ev
                 .withColumn("visit_num", visit_num)
                 .withColumn("visit_id",
                             F.concat_ws("_", F.col("user_id"),
                                         F.col("visit_num").cast("string"))))

    prof = spark.read.table("customers_current")
    enriched = sessioned.join(prof, on="user_id", how="left")

    return enriched.select(
        "user_id", "visit_id", "event_ts", "stage",
        F.col("stage_raw").alias("event_type_raw"),
        F.col("p_country").alias("profile_country"),
        F.col("p_plan").alias("profile_plan"),
        F.col("p_name").alias("profile_name"),
        F.col("p_email").alias("profile_email"),
        "raw")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Holding area for anything we could not parse/place.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="held_events")
def held_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    bad = spark.read.table("clicks_parsed").where(~F.col("is_valid"))
    reason = (F.when(F.col("m").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
               .when(F.col("user_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_user_id"))
               .when(F.col("event_ts").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_timestamp"))
               .otherwise(F.lit("unknown")))
    return bad.select("raw", reason.alias("hold_reason"))


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. gold_funnel: distinct users that reached each stage.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    s = (spark.read.table("silver_sessions")
         .where(F.col("stage").isNotNull()))
    return (s.groupBy("stage")
             .agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))
             .select("stage", "users"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
         "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/"
         "gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson")

# Type everything as string first; validate/cast later (avoid silent nulls).
SCHEMA = ("order_id string, amount string, category string, "
          "event_time string, ts string, updated_at string, "
          "seq string, version string, sequence_num string")


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_orders")
def silver_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)
    parsed = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA)).select("j.*")

    # Coalesce whatever event-time / sequence fields actually exist.
    raw_et = F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("ts"), F.col("updated_at"))
    raw_seq = F.coalesce(F.col("seq"), F.col("version"), F.col("sequence_num"))

    is_epoch = raw_et.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    event_ts = F.when(is_epoch,
                      F.timestamp_millis(raw_et.cast("long"))) \
                .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(raw_et))

    df = (parsed
          .where(F.col("order_id").isNotNull())
          .withColumn("event_ts", event_ts)
          .withColumn("amount_d", F.col("amount").cast("double")))

    # Deterministic "latest real value" per order_id:
    #   newest event time, then highest sequence, then stable value tiebreaks.
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("seq").cast("long").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("amount_d").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("category").desc_nulls_last(),
    )

    deduped = (df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                 .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                 .drop("_rn"))

    return deduped.select(
        F.col("order_id").cast("string").alias("order_id"),
        F.col("amount_d").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category").cast("string").alias("category"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT_PATH = (
    "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
    "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/"
    "gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson"
)

# Type external columns as strings first, validate, then cast (no silent nulls).
ORDERS_SCHEMA = "order_id string, amount string, category string, ts string"


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_orders")
def bronze_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT_PATH)                       # column: value
    parsed = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), ORDERS_SCHEMA))
    return parsed.select(
        F.col("j.order_id").alias("order_id"),
        F.col("j.amount").alias("amount_raw"),
        F.col("j.category").alias("category"),
        F.col("j.ts").alias("ts_raw"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_orders")
def silver_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_orders")

    # UTC-normalize event time without mutating session conf:
    # branch on epoch vs ISO so a stragglers-replay always sequences identically.
    is_epoch = F.col("ts_raw").rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    event_ts = (
        F.when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_millis(F.col("ts_raw").cast("long")))
         .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(F.col("ts_raw")))
    )

    df = (
        df.withColumn("event_ts", event_ts)
          .withColumn("amount", F.col("amount_raw").cast("double"))
          .where(F.col("order_id").isNotNull())             # key must be present
    )

    # Deterministic dedup on the business key (order_id) with an explicit,
    # fully-ordered sequence key -> same input always yields the same survivor,
    # so overlapping batch replays produce exactly one stable row per order.
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("category").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    deduped = (
        df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
          .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    )

    return deduped.select("order_id", "amount", "category")

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

# Raw orders feed for this seed (NDJSON, one JSON object per line).
DATA_PATH = (
    "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
    "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/"
    "gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson"
)


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_raw")
def orders_raw():
    # Batch relation -> materialized_view (NOT @dp.table). Lazy reader, no action.
    return SparkSession.active().read.json(DATA_PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_orders")
def silver_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("orders_raw")

    # Normalize to the contract grain/types; drop rows with no usable key.
    cleaned = (
        df.where(F.col("order_id").isNotNull())
          .select(
              F.col("order_id").cast("string").alias("order_id"),
              F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
              F.col("category").cast("string").alias("category"),
          )
    )

    # Collapse all replayed copies of an order_id into ONE row.
    # max(struct(...)) is order-independent => deterministic & replay-stable;
    # it picks a single representative value per key (no summing => no creep).
    deduped = (
        cleaned.groupBy("order_id")
               .agg(F.max(F.struct("amount", "category")).alias("rec"))
               .select(
                   F.col("order_id"),
                   F.col("rec.amount").alias("amount"),
                   F.col("rec.category").alias("category"),
               )
    )
    return deduped

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

PAYMENTS = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"
FX       = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"

CAT = "spark_catalog.default."

# ---- flexible field-name candidates (upstream is messy; don't assume exact names)
PAY_TS  = ["event_time","occurred_at","payment_time","payment_ts","ts","timestamp","created_at","time","paid_at"]
PAY_AMT = ["amount","value","foreign_amount","amount_foreign","fx_amount","amt","local_amount"]
PAY_CCY = ["currency","ccy","currency_code","cur"]
PAY_ID  = ["payment_id","id","pid","txn_id","transaction_id"]

FX_TS   = ["rate_ts","ts","timestamp","valid_from","effective_time","effective_ts","event_time","as_of","time"]
FX_RATE = ["rate","fx_rate","usd_rate","rate_to_usd","usd_per_unit","price"]
FX_CCY  = ["currency","ccy","currency_code","cur"]
FX_SEQ  = ["seq","sequence","lsn","offset","_seq","version","commit_seq","change_seq","__seq"]
FX_OP   = ["op","operation","_op","change_type","cdc_op","__op"]


def m(mapcol, keys):
    # map getItem returns null for absent keys -> coalesce picks the present one
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(mapcol)[k] for k in keys])


def to_epoch(s):
    # Normalize to UTC epoch SECONDS (double). Handles epoch sec/millis strings and ISO-8601.
    is_epoch = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    as_long  = s.cast("long")
    epoch    = F.when(F.length(s) >= F.lit(13), (as_long / F.lit(1000.0))).otherwise(as_long.cast("double"))
    iso      = F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(s)).cast("double")  # ISO w/ offset -> correct instant
    return F.when(s.isNull(), F.lit(None).cast("double")).when(is_epoch, epoch).otherwise(iso)


def to_utc_date(epoch_secs):
    # UTC calendar day WITHOUT touching session timezone: days since 1970-01-01
    days = F.floor(epoch_secs / F.lit(86400.0)).cast("int")
    return F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), days)


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_parsed")
def payments_parsed():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(PAYMENTS)
    j = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json("value", "map<string,string>"))
    return j.select(
        m("j", PAY_ID).alias("payment_id"),
        m("j", PAY_CCY).alias("currency"),
        m("j", PAY_AMT).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        to_epoch(m("j", PAY_TS)).alias("pay_epoch"),
        F.col("value").alias("raw"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_quarantine")
def payments_quarantine():
    p = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "payments_parsed")
    bad = F.col("pay_epoch").isNull() | F.col("amount").isNull() | F.col("currency").isNull()
    return p.where(bad).select("raw")


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates_clean")
def fx_rates_clean():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(FX)
    j = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json("value", "map<string,string>"))
    base = j.select(
        m("j", FX_CCY).alias("currency"),
        m("j", FX_RATE).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        to_epoch(m("j", FX_TS)).alias("rate_epoch"),
        m("j", FX_SEQ).cast("long").alias("seq"),
        F.lower(m("j", FX_OP)).alias("op"),
    )
    # exclude CDC deletes so a deleted rate cannot be applied
    base = base.where(F.col("op").isNull() | ~F.col("op").isin("d", "delete", "remove"))
    base = base.where(
        F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_epoch").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull()
    )
    # deterministic dedup per (currency, rate_epoch): keep latest CDC sequence
    w = Window.partitionBy("currency", "rate_epoch").orderBy(F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last())
    return (base.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                .drop("_rn", "op"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_enriched")
def payments_enriched():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table(CAT + "payments_parsed").where(
        F.col("pay_epoch").isNotNull() & F.col("amount").isNotNull() & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
    )
    r = spark.read.table(CAT + "fx_rates_clean")

    # as-of join: only rates in effect at/before the payment instant (never a future rate)
    cond = (p["currency"] == r["currency"]) & (r["rate_epoch"] <= p["pay_epoch"])
    joined = p.alias("p").join(r.alias("r"), cond, "left")

    pkey = F.coalesce(F.col("p.payment_id"), F.sha2(F.col("p.raw"), 256))
    joined = joined.withColumn("_pkey", pkey)

    # pick the most-recent in-effect rate per payment; deterministic tiebreak on seq
    w = Window.partitionBy("_pkey").orderBy(
        F.col("r.rate_epoch").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("r.seq").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    picked = joined.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)

    return picked.select(
        F.col("p.payment_id").alias("payment_id"),
        F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("p.amount").alias("amount"),
        F.col("r.rate").alias("rate"),
        (F.col("p.amount") * F.col("r.rate")).alias("usd_amount"),
        F.timestamp_seconds(F.col("r.rate_epoch").cast("long")).alias("rate_ts"),
        to_utc_date(F.col("p.pay_epoch")).alias("settlement_date"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    e = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "payments_enriched")
    return (e.where(F.col("usd_amount").isNotNull())
             .groupBy(F.col("settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"))
             .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

PAY_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"
FX_PATH  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

PAY_SCHEMA = ("payment_id STRING, id STRING, txn_id STRING, transaction_id STRING, "
              "amount STRING, value STRING, amount_foreign STRING, foreign_amount STRING, "
              "currency STRING, ccy STRING, currency_code STRING, curr STRING, "
              "event_time STRING, ts STRING, occurred_at STRING, timestamp STRING, "
              "created_at STRING, payment_time STRING, time STRING")

FX_SCHEMA = ("currency STRING, ccy STRING, currency_code STRING, curr STRING, "
             "rate STRING, fx_rate STRING, usd_rate STRING, rate_to_usd STRING, "
             "rate_ts STRING, ts STRING, effective_at STRING, effective_time STRING, "
             "valid_from STRING, timestamp STRING, as_of STRING, time STRING, "
             "event_time STRING, seq STRING, sequence STRING, version STRING, op STRING")


def _coalesce(*names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in names])


def _to_epoch(c):
    """Absolute UTC epoch-seconds (double) from epoch(ms/s) or offset-bearing ISO."""
    s = c.cast("string")
    digits = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    as_long = s.cast("long")
    return (F.when(digits & (F.length(s) >= 13), as_long / 1000.0)
             .when(digits & (F.length(s) <= 10), as_long.cast("double"))
             .when(digits, as_long / 1000.0)
             .otherwise(F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(s)).cast("double")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_parsed")
def payments_parsed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    j = (spark.read.text(PAY_PATH)
              .select(F.from_json("value", PAY_SCHEMA).alias("j")))
    f = j.select("j.*")
    amount = _coalesce("amount", "value", "amount_foreign", "foreign_amount")
    amount_num = F.regexp_replace(amount.cast("string"), r"[^0-9eE.\-]", "").cast("double")
    ccy = _coalesce("currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr")
    pid = _coalesce("payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id")
    tcol = _coalesce("event_time", "ts", "occurred_at", "timestamp",
                     "created_at", "payment_time", "time")
    return f.select(
        pid.alias("p_id"),
        F.upper(ccy).alias("p_ccy"),
        amount_num.alias("p_amount"),
        _to_epoch(tcol).alias("p_epoch"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_parsed")
def fx_parsed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    j = (spark.read.text(FX_PATH)
              .select(F.from_json("value", FX_SCHEMA).alias("j")))
    f = j.select("j.*")
    ccy = _coalesce("currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr")
    rate = _coalesce("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd")
    rate_num = F.regexp_replace(rate.cast("string"), r"[^0-9eE.\-]", "").cast("double")
    tcol = _coalesce("rate_ts", "ts", "effective_at", "effective_time",
                     "valid_from", "timestamp", "as_of", "time", "event_time")
    seq = _coalesce("seq", "sequence", "version").cast("long")
    op = F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("op"), F.lit("")))

    base = f.select(
        F.upper(ccy).alias("f_ccy"),
        rate_num.alias("f_rate"),
        _to_epoch(tcol).alias("f_epoch"),
        seq.alias("f_seq"),
        op.alias("f_op"),
    ).where(
        F.col("f_ccy").isNotNull()
        & F.col("f_epoch").isNotNull()
        & F.col("f_rate").isNotNull()
        & (~F.col("f_op").isin("delete", "d"))
    )

    # Dedup the CDC stream: one surviving rate per (currency, effective instant),
    # keeping the highest sequence/version deterministically.
    w = Window.partitionBy("f_ccy", "f_epoch").orderBy(
        F.col("f_seq").desc_nulls_last())
    return (base.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                .select("f_ccy", "f_rate", "f_epoch", "f_seq"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_enriched")
def payments_enriched():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_parsed")
    fx = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_parsed")

    # As-of join: candidate rates are same-currency AND effective at-or-before
    # the payment instant (never a rate stamped after the payment).
    cond = (pay["p_ccy"] == fx["f_ccy"]) & (fx["f_epoch"] <= pay["p_epoch"])
    joined = pay.join(fx, cond, "left")

    # Pick the latest in-effect rate per payment.
    w = Window.partitionBy("p_id", "p_epoch", "p_amount", "p_ccy").orderBy(
        F.col("f_epoch").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("f_seq").desc_nulls_last())
    picked = (joined.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                    .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))

    day_num = F.floor(F.col("p_epoch") / F.lit(86400.0)).cast("int")
    settlement_date = F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), day_num)

    return picked.select(
        F.col("p_id").alias("payment_id"),
        F.col("p_ccy").alias("currency"),
        F.col("p_amount").alias("foreign_amount"),
        settlement_date.alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("f_rate").alias("applied_rate"),
        F.timestamp_seconds(F.col("f_epoch").cast("long")).alias("as_applied_rate_ts"),
        (F.col("p_amount") * F.col("f_rate")).alias("usd_amount"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_enriched")
    return (e.where(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
                    & F.col("usd_amount").isNotNull())
             .groupBy("settlement_date")
             .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
             .select("settlement_date", "usd_total"))

PAY_CCY = ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur"]
PAY_TS  = ["event_time", "occurred_at", "ts", "timestamp", "payment_time",
           "created_at", "event_ts", "time", "paid_at", "payment_ts", "occurred_time"]
PAY_DBL = ["amount", "value", "foreign_amount", "amt", "fx_amount", "payment_amount"]

           "effective_time", "rate_ts", "time", "effective_from", "asof",

           "price", "usd_per_unit"]
FX_OP   = ["op", "_change_type", "change_type", "operation"]


def _schema(str_cols, dbl_cols):
    seen, fields = set(), []
    for c in str_cols:
        if c not in seen:
            fields.append(StructField(c, StringType(), True)); seen.add(c)
    for c in dbl_cols:
        if c not in seen:
            fields.append(StructField(c, DoubleType(), True)); seen.add(c)
    return StructType(fields)


PAY_SCHEMA = _schema(PAY_ID + PAY_CCY + PAY_TS, PAY_DBL)
FX_SCHEMA  = _schema(FX_CCY + FX_TS + FX_OP, FX_DBL)


def _coalesce_cols(names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in names])


def _coalesce_ts(names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.to_timestamp(F.col(c)) for c in names])


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_enriched")

    spark = SparkSession.active()

             _coalesce_cols(PAY_CCY).alias("currency"),
             _coalesce_cols(PAY_DBL).cast("double").alias("amount"),
             _coalesce_ts(PAY_TS).alias("pay_ts"),

    r = (spark.read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX)

             _coalesce_ts(FX_TS).alias("rate_ts"),
         )
         .where(F.col("rate").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull()))

    # as-of join: only rates effective at or before the payment moment
    cond = (p["currency"] == r["rate_currency"]) & (r["rate_ts"] <= p["pay_ts"])

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Input locations (this seed)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
PAYMENTS_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

# Read everything as STRING with an explicit (broad) schema so that:
#   * no schema inference / data scan happens at plan-build time
#     (avoids ATTEMPT_ANALYSIS_IN_PIPELINE_QUERY_FUNCTION), and
#   * candidate column names that are absent in the data simply become NULL
#     and are harmlessly coalesced away.
PAYMENTS_SCHEMA = (
    "payment_id string, id string, "
    "currency string, ccy string, currency_code string, "
    "amount string, value string, paid_amount string, amount_original string, "
    "event_time string, event_timestamp string, payment_time string, "
    "payment_timestamp string, ts string, timestamp string, created_at string, "
    "occurred_at string, payment_date string, settlement_date string, "
    "date string, event_date string"
)

FX_SCHEMA = (
    "currency string, ccy string, currency_code string, "
    "rate string, fx_rate string, usd_rate string, rate_to_usd string, "
    "exchange_rate string, "
    "effective_date string, rate_date string, valid_from string, "
    "as_of_date string, date string, valid_from_date string, "
    "change_ts string, commit_ts string, ingested_at string, recorded_at string, "
    "system_ts string, updated_at string, version_ts string, ts string, "
    "timestamp string, change_timestamp string, "
    "version string, version_no string, seq string, revision string, op string"
)


def _first_str(*cols):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in cols])


def _first_dbl(*cols):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c).cast("double") for c in cols])


def _first_long(*cols):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c).cast("long") for c in cols])


def _first_date(*cols):
    # First 10 chars of an ISO date/timestamp string == its UTC calendar day,
    # which is timezone-independent (no session-conf mutation required).
    return F.coalesce(*[F.to_date(F.substring(F.col(c), 1, 10)) for c in cols])


def _first_ts(*cols):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.to_timestamp(F.col(c)) for c in cols])


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Source: payments, normalized to (pid, currency, amount, settlement_date)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_src")
def payments_src():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(PAYMENTS_SCHEMA).json(PAYMENTS_PATH)

    date_cols = ["payment_date", "settlement_date", "date", "event_date"]
    ts_cols = [
        "event_time", "event_timestamp", "payment_time", "payment_timestamp",
        "ts", "timestamp", "created_at", "occurred_at",
    ]

    return df.select(
        F.monotonically_increasing_id().alias("pid"),
        _first_str("currency", "ccy", "currency_code").alias("currency"),
        _first_dbl("amount", "value", "paid_amount", "amount_original").alias("amount"),
        F.coalesce(
            _first_date(*date_cols),
            _first_date(*ts_cols),
        ).alias("settlement_date"),
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Source: fx rate CDC versions, normalized.
#   biz_date  = business-effective date the rate version applies to
#   rec_ts    = transaction time (when the version/correction was recorded)
#   rec_date  = UTC calendar day of rec_ts
#   ver       = monotonic version/sequence (tie-breaker)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_versions")
def fx_versions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX_PATH)

    biz_cols = [
        "effective_date", "rate_date", "valid_from",
        "as_of_date", "date", "valid_from_date",
    ]
    rec_cols = [
        "change_ts", "commit_ts", "ingested_at", "recorded_at", "system_ts",
        "updated_at", "version_ts", "ts", "timestamp", "change_timestamp",
    ]

    return df.select(
        _first_str("currency", "ccy", "currency_code").alias("fx_currency"),
        _first_dbl("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "exchange_rate").alias("rate"),
        _first_date(*biz_cols).alias("biz_date"),
        _first_ts(*rec_cols).alias("rec_ts"),
        _first_date(*rec_cols).alias("rec_date"),
        _first_long("version", "version_no", "seq", "revision").alias("ver"),
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Bitemporal as-of join + daily USD totals.
#
# For each payment (currency c, date d) pick the rate version that was OFFICIALLY
# IN EFFECT ON d:
#   * business-time slice: biz_date <= d   (latest effective rate as of d)
#   * transaction-time slice: rec_date <= d (exclude later corrections)
# Among survivors choose: latest biz_date, then latest rec_ts, then highest ver.
# This guarantees that a correction recorded AFTER the payment's own date is
# never applied, so reprocessing yields a stable, reproducible result.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pays = spark.read.table("payments_src")
    fx = spark.read.table("fx_versions")

    joined = (
        pays.join(fx, pays["currency"] == fx["fx_currency"], "inner")
        .where(F.col("biz_date").isNotNull())
        .where(F.col("rec_date").isNotNull())
        .where(F.col("biz_date") <= F.col("settlement_date"))
        .where(F.col("rec_date") <= F.col("settlement_date"))
    )

    w = Window.partitionBy("pid").orderBy(
        F.col("biz_date").desc(),
        F.col("rec_ts").desc(),
        F.col("ver").desc(),
    )

    picked = (
        joined.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date"),
            (F.col("amount") * F.col("rate")).alias("usd_value"),
        )
    )

    return (
        picked.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_value").alias("usd_total"))
        .select("settlement_date", "usd_total")
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"

# Tolerant schema: everything as STRING so bad/garbage values don't silently
# coerce; fields absent from a given record simply parse to null (no error).
SCHEMA = (
    "customer_id STRING, tier STRING, region STRING, "
    "seq STRING, version STRING, change_seq STRING, sequence STRING, "
    "offset STRING, lsn STRING, "
    "event_ts STRING, ts STRING, event_time STRING, updated_at STRING, "
    "op STRING, op_type STRING, deleted STRING"
)


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_cdc_raw")
def customers_cdc_raw():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(INPUT)
    return raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA)).select("value", "j.*")


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("customers_cdc_raw")

    # A change event must carry the key to be actionable.
    df = df.where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())

    # Normalize event-time for ordering only (epoch vs ISO-8601, instant-based,
    # so ordering is independent of session timezone).
    time_str = F.coalesce(
        F.col("event_ts"), F.col("ts"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("updated_at")
    )
    is_epoch = time_str.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    event_ts = F.when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_millis(time_str.cast("long"))) \
                .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(time_str))

    # Explicit monotonic sequence as the deterministic tiebreaker.
    seq_num = F.coalesce(
        *[F.col(c).cast("long") for c in ["seq", "version", "change_seq", "sequence", "offset", "lsn"]]
    )

    df = df.withColumn("_ts", event_ts).withColumn("_seq", seq_num)

    # Keep the newest record per customer, deterministically.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_seq").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    latest = df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)

    # Tombstone = latest event is an empty payload (both attributes absent).
    # Exclude those customers entirely; everyone else reflects latest real values.
    survivors = latest.where(~(F.col("tier").isNull() & F.col("region").isNull()))

    return survivors.select(
        F.col("customer_id"), F.col("tier"), F.col("region")
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
         "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/"
         "gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson")

# Type everything as string first; validate/normalize later. Extra candidate
# field names are harmless (absent -> null after from_json).
SCHEMA = ("customer_id string, tier string, region string, "
          "ts string, event_time string, timestamp string, "
          "seq string, sequence string, version string, "
          "op string, __deleted string, deleted string")


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_cdc_parsed")
def customers_cdc_parsed():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(INPUT)            # column: value
    return raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json("value", SCHEMA)).select("value", "j.*")


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("customers_cdc_parsed")

    # --- normalize event-time to a real instant (epoch vs ISO) for ordering ---
    et = F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("timestamp"))
    is_epoch = et.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    event_ts = F.when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_millis(et.cast("long"))) \
                .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(et))

    # explicit, deterministic sequence key when available
    seq = F.coalesce(F.col("seq"), F.col("sequence"), F.col("version")).cast("long")

    # --- deletion = empty record (tier AND region blank), or explicit markers ---
    blank_tier = F.col("tier").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("tier")) == F.lit(""))
    blank_region = F.col("region").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("region")) == F.lit(""))
    explicit_delete = (F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("op"), F.lit(""))).isin("d", "delete")) | \
                      (F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("__deleted"), F.col("deleted"), F.lit(""))) == F.lit("true"))
    is_delete = (blank_tier & blank_region) | explicit_delete

    enriched = (df
                .withColumn("_event_ts", event_ts)
                .withColumn("_seq", seq)
                .withColumn("_is_delete", is_delete))

    # latest real state per customer; deterministic survivor on same input
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
            F.col("_seq").desc_nulls_last(),
            F.col("_event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
            F.col("value").desc())

    latest = (enriched
              .where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())
              .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
              .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))

    surviving = latest.where(~F.col("_is_delete"))
    return surviving.select("customer_id", "tier", "region")

from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DATA = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
        "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/"
        "gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson")


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_cdc_raw")
def customers_cdc_raw():
    # Batch read of the change feed; preserve arrival order as a column.
    # monotonically_increasing_id reflects file/read order and is stable for
    # the same input, so reprocessing yields the same result.
    return (
        SparkSession.active()
        .read.json(DATA)
        .withColumn("_ord", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("customers_cdc_raw")

    # Latest change event per customer.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(F.col("_ord").desc())
    latest = (
        df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
          .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    )

    # A deletion is published as an empty record: no real attribute values.
    tier = F.col("tier")
    region = F.col("region")
    is_tombstone = (
        (tier.isNull() | (F.trim(tier.cast("string")) == F.lit(""))) &
        (region.isNull() | (F.trim(region.cast("string")) == F.lit("")))
    )

    return (
        latest.filter(~is_tombstone)
              .select(
                  F.col("customer_id"),
                  F.col("tier"),
                  F.col("region"),
              )
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

INPUT = (
    "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
    "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_emails_seed1337.ndjson"
)

# Multilingual keyword sets (lowercased, unicode-aware). Order of evaluation
# encodes priority: urgent > spam > routing > info.
URGENT = (
    r"(urgent|urgente|urgents|asap|emergency|emergencia|urgence|"
    r"immediately|immediat|critical|cr[ií]tico|kritisch|outage|"
    r"down|breach|dringend|sofort|eilig|срочно|紧急|緊急|急ぎ|"
    r"عاجل|즉시|긴급)"
)
SPAM = (
    r"(free|gratis|gratuit|gratuito|win\b|winner|won\b|prize|premio|"
    r"lottery|loterie|loter[ií]a|jackpot|click here|clic aqu[ií]|"
    r"offer|oferta|discount|descuento|viagra|congratulations|"
    r"felicidades|cash|gewinn|kostenlos|бесплатно|выигрыш|免费|"
    r"中奖|当選|무료|당첨|مجان[ai]?|\$\$\$|!!!)"
)
ROUTING = (
    r"(route|routing|forward|reenviar|reassign|reassignment|assign|"
    r"ticket|transfer|transferir|transf[ée]rer|weiterleiten|"
    r"escalate|escalat|department|departamento|queue|переслать|"
    r"перенаправ|转发|転送|전달)"
)


@dp.materialized_view(name="classified_emails")
def classified_emails():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    # Read the raw NDJSON as text first so malformed lines don't silently vanish,
    # then parse with an explicit string schema (no field is coerced to a type
    # that could null-out real content).
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)
    parsed = raw.withColumn(
        "j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), "email_id string, subject string")
    )

    df = parsed.select(
        F.col("j.email_id").alias("email_id"),
        F.col("j.subject").alias("subject"),
    )

    # Normalized view of the subject used ONLY for matching. The output keeps the
    # original subject untouched. coalesce->trim->lower makes blank/null explicit.
    norm = F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce(F.col("subject"), F.lit(""))))
    is_blank = norm == F.lit("")

    category = (
        # Blank subjects can't carry intent -> deterministic 'info', not a misfire.
        F.when(is_blank, F.lit("info"))
        # Priority-ordered keyword routing, multilingual so non-English subjects
        # are tagged on meaning rather than falling through to a wrong default.
        .when(norm.rlike(URGENT), F.lit("urgent"))
        .when(norm.rlike(SPAM), F.lit("spam"))
        .when(norm.rlike(ROUTING), F.lit("routing"))
        # Everything else (incl. non-English with no actionable keyword) -> info.
        .otherwise(F.lit("info"))
    )

    return df.withColumn("category", category).select(
        "email_id", "subject", "category"
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

INPUT_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_emails_seed2718.ndjson"

# Explicit schema -> no schema-inference job -> no analysis in the query function.
EMAIL_SCHEMA = "email_id string, subject string"

# Multilingual keyword sets (EN + ES + FR + DE). Matched against a lowercased,
# trimmed subject as substrings so a non-English subject classifies the same as
# its English counterpart instead of falling through to a wrong default.
SPAM_KW = [
    "free", "winner", "you won", "you have won", "prize", "lottery", "casino",
    "viagra", "pharmacy", "discount", "cheap", "buy now", "click here",
    "unsubscribe", "credit", "loan", "million dollars", "congratulations",
    "congrats", "limited offer", "special offer", "best deal", "huge sale",
    "promo", "bitcoin", "crypto", "investment opportunity", "act now",
    # es
    "gratis", "ganador", "premio", "loteria", "lotería", "oferta especial",
    "descuento", "felicidades", "gana dinero",
    # fr
    "gratuit", "gagnant", "vous avez gagne", "vous avez gagné", "prix",
    "felicitations", "félicitations", "offre speciale", "offre spéciale",
    # de
    "kostenlos", "gewinner", "gewonnen", "gluckwunsch", "glückwunsch",
    "sonderangebot", "rabatt",
]

URGENT_KW = [
    "urgent", "asap", "as soon as possible", "emergency", "immediately",
    "critical", "action required", "respond now", "right away", "deadline",
    "time sensitive", "outage", "down now", "server down",
    # es
    "urgente", "inmediato", "emergencia", "ahora mismo", "lo antes posible",
    # fr
    "immediat", "immédiat", "urgence", "des que possible", "dès que possible",
    # de
    "dringend", "sofort", "notfall", "eilig",
]

ROUTING_KW = [
    "invoice", "billing", "order #", "order number", "shipping", "delivery",
    "payment", "account", "support ticket", "ticket #", "refund", "return",
    "cancel subscription", "password reset", "reset password", "please forward",
    "please route", "transfer to", "direct to", "wrong department", "assign to",
    "case number", "rma",
    # es
    "factura", "pedido", "envio", "envío", "reembolso", "transferir a",
    "reenviar", "restablecer contrasena", "restablecer contraseña",
    # fr
    "facture", "commande", "livraison", "remboursement", "transferer",
    "transférer", "reinitialiser le mot de passe", "réinitialiser le mot de passe",
    # de
    "rechnung", "bestellung", "lieferung", "ruckerstattung", "rückerstattung",
    "weiterleiten", "passwort zurucksetzen", "passwort zurücksetzen",
]


def _matches(col, keywords):
    # Build a single regex alternation of escaped keyword substrings.
    pattern = "|".join(F.lit  for _ in [])  # placeholder (unused)
    import re
    alternation = "|".join(re.escape(k) for k in keywords)
    return col.rlike(alternation)


@dp.materialized_view(name="classified_emails")
def classified_emails():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    df = spark.read.schema(EMAIL_SCHEMA).json(INPUT_PATH)

    subj = F.coalesce(F.col("subject"), F.lit(""))
    norm = F.lower(F.trim(subj))

    is_blank = F.length(F.trim(subj)) == 0

    is_spam = _matches(norm, SPAM_KW)
    is_urgent = _matches(norm, URGENT_KW)
    is_routing = _matches(norm, ROUTING_KW)

    category = (
        F.when(is_blank, F.lit("info"))          # blank -> deterministic default
         .when(is_spam, F.lit("spam"))
         .when(is_urgent, F.lit("urgent"))
         .when(is_routing, F.lit("routing"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("info"))
    )

    return df.select(
        F.col("email_id"),
        F.col("subject"),
        category.alias("category"),
    )

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_emails_seed1337.ndjson"

# Multilingual keyword signals. Matched on a normalized (lowercased, stripped) subject.
URGENT = [
    # en
    "urgent", "asap", "emergency", "immediately", "immediate", "critical",
    "right away", "right now", "act now", "time sensitive", "high priority",
    # es
    "urgente", "emergencia", "inmediato", "inmediatamente", "cuanto antes",
    # fr
    "immediat", "immédiat", "urgence", "tout de suite", "des que possible",
    # de
    "dringend", "sofort", "notfall", "eilig",
    # pt
    "urgente", "emergencia", "imediato",
    # it
    "urgente", "emergenza", "immediato",
]
SPAM = [
    # en
    "free", "winner", "you won", "you've won", "win ", "prize", "lottery",
    "congratulations", "claim your", "cash", "discount", "offer", "click here",
    "limited time", "viagra", "cheap", "deal", "buy now", "guaranteed",
    "credit", "bitcoin", "crypto", "investment opportunity", "$$$",

    "descuento", "felicidades", "haz clic", "dinero",

    "gratuit", "gagnez", "gagnant", "loterie", "offre", "remise",
    "felicitations", "félicitations", "cliquez ici",
    # de
    "kostenlos", "gewinnen", "gewinner", "gewonnen", "rabatt", "angebot",
    "klicken sie", "glückwunsch", "glueckwunsch",
    # pt
    "gratis", "grátis", "premio", "prêmio", "ganhou", "oferta", "desconto",
    # it
    "gratis", "vincitore", "hai vinto", "premio", "offerta", "sconto",
]
ROUTING = [
    # en
    "forward", "route", "routing", "transfer", "assign", "reassign",
    "department", "redirect", "please direct", "ticket #", "case #",
    "escalate", "dispatch", "send to", "on behalf of", "fwd:", "fw:",
    # es
    "reenviar", "transferir", "departamento", "redirigir", "asignar",
    # fr
    "transferer", "transférer", "rediriger", "departement", "département",
    "assigner", "tr:",
    # de
    "weiterleiten", "weiterleitung", "abteilung", "zuweisen", "wg:",
    # pt
    "encaminhar", "transferir", "departamento", "redirecionar", "enc:",
    # it
    "inoltra", "inoltro", "trasferire", "reparto", "assegnare",
]


def _tag(subject):
    # Correct handling for blank / whitespace / null subjects: nothing to act on.
    if subject is None:
        return "info"
    s = subject.strip().lower()
    if s == "":
        return "info"
    # Priority order: genuine urgency, then commercial spam, then routing, else info.
    if any(k in s for k in URGENT):
        return "urgent"
    if any(k in s for k in SPAM):
        return "spam"
    if any(k in s for k in ROUTING):
        return "routing"
    return "info"


tag_udf = F.udf(_tag, StringType())


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_emails")
def raw_emails():
    # Batch relation -> materialized_view. Unresolved plan only (no actions).
    return (
        SparkSession.active()
        .read.json(DATA)
        .select(
            F.col("email_id").cast("string").alias("email_id"),
            F.col("subject").cast("string").alias("subject"),
        )
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="classified_emails")
def classified_emails():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("raw_emails")
    return src.select(
        F.col("email_id"),
        F.col("subject"),
        tag_udf(F.col("subject")).alias("category"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StringType

DATA_URI = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_emails_seed2718.ndjson"

# Multilingual keyword sets (en/es/fr/de/it/pt). Matched as substrings on a
# trimmed, lowercased subject so non-English subjects are tagged correctly
# instead of falling through to a wrong default.
SPAM = [
    # english
    "free", "winner", "you won", "you've won", "prize", "lottery", "jackpot",
    "congratulations", "congrats", "click here", "click now", "buy now",
    "discount", "special offer", "limited offer", "limited time", "cheap",
    "cash", "viagra", "casino", "$$$", "100% free", "act now", "risk-free",
    "guarantee", "earn money", "make money", "million dollars", "bitcoin",
    "crypto", "investment opportunity", "no cost", "best price", "save big",
    # spanish
    "gratis", "ganador", "premio", "gana ", "oferta", "descuento", "dinero",
    "gratuito", "felicidades", "loteria", "lotería",
    # french
    "gratuit", "gagnez", "gagnant", "félicitations", "felicitations", "offre",
    "remise", "argent", "loterie",
    # german
    "gewinn", "gewinner", "kostenlos", "glückwunsch", "glueckwunsch",
    "angebot", "rabatt", "geld gewinnen", "gratis",
    # italian
    "vincitore", "premio", "offerta", "sconto", "vinci", "gratuito",
    # portuguese
    "grátis", "gratis", "ganhador", "prêmio", "premio", "oferta",
    "desconto", "parabéns", "parabens", "loteria",
]

URGENT = [
    # english
    "urgent", "asap", "emergency", "immediately", "critical", "right away",
    "time-sensitive", "time sensitive", "action required", "action needed",
    "please respond", "respond now", "deadline", "escalate", "outage",
    "system down", "server down", "is down", "not working", "doesn't work",
    "cannot access", "can't access", "broken", "failure", "fault", "down!",
    # spanish
    "urgente", "emergencia", "inmediato", "inmediatamente", "crítico", "critico",
    # french
    "urgent", "urgence", "immédiat", "immediat", "critique", "panne",
    # german
    "dringend", "sofort", "notfall", "kritisch", "ausfall",
    # italian
    "urgente", "emergenza", "critico", "immediato",
    # portuguese
    "urgente", "emergência", "emergencia", "crítico", "critico", "imediato",
]

ROUTING = [
    # english
    "ticket", "case #", "case number", "ref:", "reference", "assigned",
    "reassign", "transfer", "escalation", "follow up", "follow-up",
    "department", "queue", "routing", "please route", "redirect",
    "incident", "request #", "support request",
    # spanish
    "reenviar", "reenvío", "reenvio", "transferir", "derivar", "asignado",
